news.Title: Alibaba's Profits Are Falling -- but Here's Why Investors Should Pay Attention
news.Content:
Alibaba Group (NYSE: BABA) just delivered quarterly results that, on the surface, look disappointing. Profit plunged and revenue growth slowed -- and the stock reacted negatively.

But focusing only on those headline numbers risks missing the most important shift happening inside the company.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Alibaba's latest results don't just show a weaker quarter; they also reveal a broader trend. They reveal a business that is actively transforming, and that transformation could define its next decade.

Profit is falling, but it's by design

The most eye-catching figure from the fourth-quarter report was Alibaba's sharp profit decline. Net income fell by roughly two-thirds year over year, a drop that would normally raise serious concerns.

But this isn't a case of a business losing control, nor is it a case of the company losing its edge . Conversely, it's a case of a business choosing to invest. Alibaba is pouring capital into two key areas: cloud infrastructure and artificial intelligence (AI), and quick commerce and instant delivery.

Those investments are putting short-term pressure on margins. For instance, its large investments in expanding the quick commerce business took a huge bite out of its e-commerce profitability as the business shelled out in an effort to grow user engagement, mindshare, and revenue.

Cloud and AI are becoming the new engines

While overall profits declined, one segment told a different story.

The cloud intelligence group, Alibaba's AI and cloud computing segment, delivered 36% year-over-year revenue growth, making it the company's fastest-growing major business. Even more importantly, AI-related workloads grew at triple-digit percentage rates for the 10th consecutive quarter.

This matters because AI changes the economics of cloud computing. For instance, AI workloads require significantly more computing power than traditional applications. That means higher spending per customer, stronger long-term demand, and potentially better economics over time.

Alibaba is investing aggressively to capture this opportunity, expanding data centers, developing its Qwen AI models, and building tools for enterprise customers.

Management even outlined a long-term ambition to generate over $100 billion in annual cloud and AI revenue within five years, a signal that cloud and AI are no longer viewed as side businesses but as central to Alibaba's future.

Story Continues

E-commerce is stabilizing at a lower growth rate

At the same time, Alibaba's core e-commerce business is no longer the growth engine it once was.

Revenue growth in Chinese e-commerce remained modest in the latest quarter at 6%, reflecting both the rapid scaling of the younger quick commerce business and the flattest performance of its traditional e-commerce business, led by Taobao and Tmall, which grew by just 1% year over year.

To defend its position, Alibaba has been investing in user experience and integrating AI into its consumer-facing services, leveraging its flagship AI model, Qwen. These efforts are helping stabilize engagement, but they come at a cost.

The takeaway is clear: E-commerce still matters, but it is no longer driving Alibaba's growth story.

The trade-off investors need to understand

Alibaba's latest results highlight a fundamental trade-off: The company is sacrificing near-term profitability to invest in long-term opportunities.

This is most visible in quick commerce, where growth is strong but margins remain weak due to high logistics costs and aggressive competition. It is also evident in cloud and AI, where demand is accelerating, but the required infrastructure investments are substantial.

The opportunity is real. But turning that opportunity into sustainable, profitable growth will take time.

What does it mean for investors?

Alibaba is no longer the company it used to be. It is evolving from a commerce-driven business into a broader platform centered on cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and local services. That transition will not be linear, and it will likely continue to pressure margins in the near term.

But periods like this often matter most for long-term investors. If Alibaba succeeds in turning its cloud and AI operations into scalable, profitable businesses, today's earnings pressure could represent an investment phase rather than a permanent decline.

And that's why investors should look beyond falling profits and focus on what Alibaba is building next.

news.Title: 台股大漲826點史上第7大漲點　台積電收1845元
news.Content:
美國總統川普喊話中東戰爭即將結束，台股今天（25日）大漲826點，寫下史上第7大漲點，終場收在3萬3439點。

川普喊話戰事即將結束，帶動國際油價回跌到百元之內，台股在權值股帶動下，一度大漲1093點站上月線，終場上漲826點，收在3萬3439點、月線得而復失，漲幅2.54%，但成交量縮小到6247億。

台積電一開盤就強彈3%，終場上漲35元來到1845元，漲幅1.93%；鴻海上漲5元，成為200元；聯發科維持平盤1620元。千金股氣勢如虹，股王信驊大漲超過6%的帶動下，盤中高達11檔千金股亮燈漲停。此外，宜鼎和亞德客- KY盤中雙雙站回千元大關，讓台股重返38檔千金股的盛況。

三大法人總計買超507.58億元，其中自營商買超131.42億元，投信買超12.89億元，外資及陸資買超363.27億元。

群益投顧表示，台灣經濟基本面穩健無虞，目前影響台股表現最大變數是美伊戰爭，短期內台股將呈現較大幅度震盪格局，投資風險高，投資人可暫時降低持股，謹慎靈活操作。

◆本資料僅供參考，投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。

news.Title: 不畏台股劇烈洗刷 「逆風」表現前10強主動基金一次看
news.Content:
[Newtalk新聞] 近日金融市場多受美伊衝突影響，近一周台股大盤也呈負報酬的「逆風盤」，截至周一（23 日）指數跌 1.86%，不過有逾百檔台股一般型基金逆勢突圍、表現領先大盤。

近一周來，在打敗大盤的百檔台股一般型基金中，績效前十名繳出 3～5% 含息報酬成績。表現相對亮眼的分別為「統一經建基金」、「凱基台灣精五門基金」、「野村優質基金」、「PGIM保德信金滿意基金」，及「野村積極成長基金」，這五檔近一周績效皆破 4%；拉長至今年迄今，「凱基台灣精五門基金」含息報酬率 36.21%，「元大新主流基金」更是搶鏡，含息報酬率高達 51.2%。

凱基台灣精五門基金研究團隊指出，AI 台廠供應鏈持續受惠於 AI 基礎設施的投資熱潮，隨著 AI 伺服器的機櫃組裝日益順暢，散熱、滑軌、機殼及電源供應器等零組件廠商在第一季有望繳出淡季不淡的表現；而通用型伺服器市場也同步迎來復甦，台灣相關硬體供應鏈的獲利前景樂觀。

在 AI 與雲端運算需求不減的態勢下，經濟部近期公布我國三月份預估外銷訂單金額約落在 760～780 億美元之間，年增率預計可達 38.4%～42.0%，顯示台灣外銷動能仍然強勁。

市場法人表示，各國持續投入 AI 基礎設施的建置，AI 供應鏈族群具獲利優先受惠的優勢，惟若中東緊張情勢延續，短期內恐將透過油價與運輸成本推升全球通膨壓力，進而干擾終端消費需求與企業的投資信心，建議投資人參與股市成長的同時，做好資產配置應對市場波動。

news.Title: 台股強彈 「市值二哥」之爭拉大距離 台達電市值飆破4兆大關寫新頁
news.Content:
中東局勢似有轉機，全球股市反彈，台股今（25）終場大漲826.87點，資金回流電子權值股，其中 台達電 盤中股價衝上漲停1555元改寫新高，終場收在1550元，換算市值約4.02兆元，坐穩「市值二哥」寶座。台積電目前仍以約47.84兆元市值穩居龍頭；台達電躍升至4兆元級距後，與第三名鴻海市值約2.79兆元差距進一步擴大。

鴻海過去穩居市值二哥，但今年一月台達電憑藉AI資料中心強勁需求題材，股價突破千元，市值超越鴻海，打破過去「台積電、鴻海、聯發科」的長年排名結構，鴻海近期因毛利率疑慮股價走跌，今天總算一吐悶氣，收復200元大關，收盤市值為2.79兆元，至於聯發科則以市值2.59兆元，緊追在後。

法人指出，台達電此波股價強攻，除受惠大盤反彈帶動，更關鍵在於AI資料中心建置需求持續擴大，帶動高功率電源與散熱解決方案出貨暢旺，推升營運動能。

台達電去年稅後淨利達601.08億元，年增約七成，每股稅後純益23.14元，雙雙改寫歷史新高，基本面表現強勁。

展望後市，台達電董事長鄭平日前於法說會表示，包括美國大型雲端服務供應商（CSP）在內的主要客戶，今年資本支出計畫多已定案，看好AI需求將持續帶動公司營運成長。

news.Title: 千億美元業務竟「沒有簽合約」 黃仁勳曝輝達、台積電合作30年內幕
news.Content:
輝達執行長黃仁勳在最新訪談中分享與台積電合作的細節，讚揚台積電的成功不光是優異的技術，更重要的是建立與客戶的長期信任，以及管理全球客戶的能力。黃仁勳透露，輝達與台積電合作30多年，許多高達數百億美元，甚至上千億美元的業務是在沒有簽合約的狀況下進行，台積電看重信任與客戶承諾，成為難以取代的價值。

沒合約也行？雙方的高度互信

台積電在先進製程技術領先競爭對手，囊括超過9成的市佔率，黃仁勳指出，外界多半將台積電的成功歸功於技術領先，但這種看法存在誤解。

台積電與競爭對手的差別在哪？黃仁勳認為，台積電重視對客戶的承諾，讓人放心將訂單交給台積電，且台積電管理客戶的能力非常出色。

黃仁勳解釋，台積電在全球業務的協調能力出眾，能夠應對數百家客戶的需求變化，並在產量、良率與成本間取得平衡。黃仁勳也以自身為例，輝達與台積電30多年來的合作，許多數百億美元的業務是在沒有正式合約下進行的。

2大關鍵遙遙領先對手

台積電的產品穩定且高品質，且高度重視客戶承諾，讓客戶相信台積電能準時交貨。相較之下，三星與英特爾技術不如台積電，又因為不是純代工，旗下仍有相似的業務，引發客戶擔憂智慧財產權的風險，始終無法討到便宜甚至彎道超車。

目前市場預估，輝達是台積電的第二大客戶，營收占比約11%，僅次於蘋果，主要受惠於人工智慧基礎建設大爆發，輝達營收佔比也跟著逐年提高。
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳透露，與台積電合作30多年，許多高達數百億甚至上千億美元的業務是在沒有簽署合約的情況下進行。
• 黃仁勳讚揚台積電的成功不僅在於技術，更重要的是建立與客戶的長期信任及管理全球客戶的能力。
• 他認為台積電的穩定高品質產品和對客戶的承諾，使其難以被三星和英特爾等競爭對手超越。
• 輝達是台積電第二大客戶，營收佔比約11%，受惠於AI基礎建設的爆發，其營收佔比逐年提高。
news.Keywords: 信任合作,先進製程,客戶承諾,AI基礎建設,營收佔比

news.Title: 《台北股市》外資翻多衝今年第七大！ 三大法人狂補507億元
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】台股25日強勢見到千點以上漲點，漲勢一路延續至尾盤。權值股穩盤，台積電（2330）上漲35元收1845元，鴻海上漲5元至200元。股王信驊（5274）大漲5.41%，收11500元，盤中高見11950元；千金股回升至38檔，力旺（3529）、弘塑（3131）、嘉澤（3533）等10檔鎖漲停。題材股，記憶體、面板與玻纖布轉強，價量齊揚，力積電（6770）、群創（3481）分居成交量冠亞軍。終場加權指數收33,439.11點，大漲826.87點，惟成交量縮至6247億元，顯示市場心態仍偏保守。今日外資(不含外資自營商)買超363.2752億元，投信買超12.8879億元，自營商買超131.4241億元，三大法人買超507.58億元。外資改寫今年第七大買超；自營商創下今年第二，史上11大紀錄。

受到美伊兩國於2月底爆發衝突影響，外資自3月以來大舉調節台股，截至24日止，累計對集中市場賣超達8166億元，市場一度憂心恐創下單月歷史最大賣超紀錄。不過，今（25）日資金面出現明顯轉折，外資與自營商同步回補，終結連續四日賣超態勢，台股罕見出現三大法人全面買超的一致性動作。其中，外資買超363億元，為今年第七大買超金額；自營商買超131億元，則為今年第二大、歷史排名第11大。隨著外資轉向多方操作，本月累計賣超金額亦降至8000億元以下，縮減至約7,04億元。

美伊戰爭擾亂國際股市，台股今日雖然受到「停火方案」的激勵，強勢反彈近千點，但市場仍是觀望態度，台股呈現價漲量縮的脫鉤格局。面對動盪局勢，富邦投顧副總陶治瑋表示，台股5日線與月線已下彎走弱，短期均線與月線也在上方形成線型反壓，而日成交量能縮減，市場買盤進場意願不高，加上外資連續調節賣超，籌碼面表現不佳，預期台股短期將在31800～34200點間，區間整理。（編輯：張嘉倚）
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股25日強勢反彈，加權指數大漲826.87點，收在33,439.11點，成交量縮至6247億元。
• 外資買超363.27億元，創今年第七大買超；自營商買超131.42億元，創今年第二大紀錄。
• 三大法人合計買超507.58億元，終結外資連續四日賣超態勢。
• 權值股如台積電上漲35元至1845元，鴻海上漲5元至200元，股王信驊大漲5.41%。
• 市場預期台股短期將在31800～34200點間區間整理，需觀察成交量能及外資動向。
news.Keywords: 三大法人,外資買超,權值股,量縮,區間整理

news.Title: 台積電收1845元　台股終場上漲826點
news.Content:
[NOWNEWS今日新聞] 美國股市週二震盪走低，僅費半指數逆勢走高，此外，台指期夜盤大漲678點，顯示短線資金開始回流，連帶台北股市今（25）日開盤上漲113.03點、來到32725.27點，隨後一路走高，盤中最高一度漲逾千點，來到33705.75點，終場上漲826.87點或2.54%，收在33439.11點，成交量為6247.11億元。

中小型股同步走高，櫃買指數開盤上漲1.03點、來到313.77點，終場上漲12.13點或3.88%，收在324.87點，成交量為1606.35億元。今日個股成交量排行榜前五名為：力積電、群創、華邦電、燿華、台玻；個股成交值排行榜前五名為：台積電、台達電、南亞科、華邦電、力積電。

權值股全數走高，權王台積電以1865元盤上開出，盤中最高一度來到1875元，終場上漲35元或1.93%，收在1845元，挹注大盤指數就有285點；台達電盤中一度攻上漲停板1550元，終場上漲135元或9.54%，收在1550元，挹注大盤指數就有94點；鴻海終場上漲5元或2.56%，收在200元整數關卡。

電子人氣股回神上攻，其中PCB族群掀起漲停潮，欣興、南電、燿華、志聖、定穎投控、達航科技、德宏、亞泰金屬、聯茂、華通攻上漲停板，景碩、富喬、柏承上漲逾9%，恩德上漲逾8%。

矽光子概念股也同步走高，聯亞、訊芯-KY、IET-KY、華星光、環宇-KY、眾達-KY、穩懋、光聖、智邦攻上漲停板，惠特、矽格、聯鈞、明泰上漲逾8%。

更加強勁的是設備股，辛耘、印能科技、志聖、弘塑、昇陽半導體、星雲、牧德、萬潤、陽程、致茂、均華攻上漲停板，惠特上漲逾8%，博磊、京鼎、德律上漲逾7%。

此外，高價股也有表現，股王信驊終場上漲逾5%，收在11500元，帶動千金股一同向上衝，聯亞、嘉澤、印能科技、弘塑、力旺、光聖、致茂、智邦、均華、昇達科攻上漲停板，台達電上漲逾9%，奇鋐、雍智上漲逾7%。
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股25日開高走高，終場上漲826.87點或2.54%，收在33439.11點，成交量為6247.11億元。
• 權王台積電以1865元開出，終場上漲35元或1.93%，收在1845元，貢獻大盤約285點。
• 台達電盤中一度攻上漲停板1550元，終場上漲135元或9.54%，貢獻大盤約94點。
• 鴻海上漲5元或2.56%，收在200元整數關卡。
• 電子人氣股、矽光子概念股、設備股及高價股普遍走高，PCB族群掀起漲停潮。
news.Keywords: 權值股,電子股,AI概念股,漲停,高價股

news.Title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Apple, Meta Platforms, Chevron, Investors Title and AmeriServ Financial
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – March 25, 2026 – Zacks.com announces the list of stocks featured in the Analyst Blog. Every day the Zacks Equity Research analysts discuss the latest news and events impacting stocks and the financial markets. Stocks recently featured in the blog include: Apple Inc. AAPL, Meta Platforms, Inc. META, Chevron Corp. CVX, Investors Title Co. ITIC and AmeriServ Financial, Inc. ASRV.

Here are highlights from Tuesday’s Analyst Blog:

Top Research Reports for Apple, Meta Platforms and Chevron

The Zacks Research Daily presents the best research output of our analyst team. Today's Research Daily features new research reports on 16 major stocks, including Apple Inc., Meta Platforms, Inc. and Chevron Corp., as well as two micro-cap stocks Investors Title Co. and AmeriServ Financial, Inc. The Zacks microcap research is unique as our research content on these small and under-the-radar companies is the only research of its type in the country.

These research reports have been hand-picked from the roughly 70 reports published by our analyst team today.

You can see all of today’s research reports here >>>

Today's Featured Research Reports

Shares of Apple have gained +12.8% over the past year against the Zacks Computer - Micro Computers industry’s gain of +13.7%. The company is benefiting from strong growth in iPhone and Services revenues. AAPL continues to gain momentum in emerging markets India and Greater China reported strong fiscal first quarter growth driven by iPhone.

Apple now has more than 1 billion paid subscribers across its Services portfolio and 2.5 billion active devices. Expanding capabilities of AI Intelligence is noteworthy. Apple expects the March quarter’s net sales to grow between 13% and 16% on a year-over-year basis despite constrained iPhone supply. Services are expected to grow at the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025 rate.

However, gross margins are expected to be 48-49% in the second quarter of fiscal 2026. Increasing regulatory headwinds and stiff competition are major concerns for the iPhone-maker.

(You can read the full research report on Apple here >>> )

Meta’s shares have declined -4.7% over the past year against the Zacks Internet - Software industry’s decline of -11%. The company is benefiting from increasing AI-infusion across its services which currently reach more than 3.58 billion people daily. META’s improved recommendation system is driving up user engagement. Instagram Reels had a strong fourth-quarter, with watch time up more than 30% year-over-year in the United States.

Facebook video time continued to grow double-digits year-over-year in the United States. Recommendation improvement drove 20% lift in time spent on Threads. AI usage is making META a popular name among advertisers.

Meta Platforms now expects to invest significantly more over the next few years in developing more advanced models and the largest AI services in the world. However, monetization of these AI services will take considerable time, which is a concern. Increasing regulatory challenges is a headwind for investors

(You can read the full research report on Meta here >>> )

Shares of Chevron have gained +31.2% over the past year against the Zacks Oil and Gas - Integrated - International industry’s gain of +38.8%. The company’s portfolio is strengthening, but risks keep the outlook balanced. The Hess acquisition adds high-quality assets in Guyana, the Bakken, and the Gulf of America, lifting long-term production visibility and free cash flow potential.

Even with weak oil prices, free cash flow grew sharply in 2025, supported by cost discipline, asset quality, and steady operations. Deepwater projects like Ballymore and Whale, along with a dominant Permian position, underpin medium-term growth, while ongoing efficiency gains are lowering breakevens.

But execution and geopolitical risks remain, as seen at Tengiz, while Venezuela upside depends on policy clarity. Downstream and chemicals face margin pressure, valuation is elevated versus peers, and energy transition progress trails Europe. Taken together, these factors support a Neutral view on CVX stock.

(You can read the full research report on Chevron here >>> )

Investors Title’s shares have declined -7.4% over the past year against the Zacks Insurance - Property and Casualty industry’s decline of -8.3%. This microcap company with a market capitalization of $406.81 million has risks that remain material. The business is highly cyclical and tied to real estate volumes, with significant geographic concentration. Rising operating costs could pressure margins. Investment income volatility adds further downside risk. The company's valuation appears reasonable (6.68X EV/EBITDA), below industry peers.

Nevertheless, Investors Title’s earnings have strengthened meaningfully, with revenues rising to $272.8 million in 2025 and margins expanding to 12.9%, reflecting improved operating leverage and earnings quality. Core title premiums continue to grow across both agency and direct channels, signaling durable franchise demand.

The 2026 backdrop is supportive, with improving mortgage activity and lower rates, while recent state rate hikes (notably in NC) provide incremental revenue upside. A strong balance sheet and cash generation enhance flexibility, supporting dividends and buybacks.

(You can read the full research report on Investors Title here >>> )

Shares of AmeriServ Financial have outperformed the Zacks Banks - Northeast industry over the past year (+64% vs. +15.6%). This microcap company with a market capitalization of $62.1 million is supported by improving core earnings momentum in 2025, driven by a 17% rise in net interest income and margin expansion to 3.15%, reflecting better asset yields and funding costs.

Balance sheet strength improved as deposit growth reduced reliance on higher-cost borrowings, positioning the bank with a more stable, lower-cost funding base entering 2026. Credit quality also trended positively following the resolution of a large problem loan, lowering non-performing and classified loans. Strategic partnerships in wealth management signal a shift toward scalable fee-based revenue.

However, risks remain elevated. CRE concentration is high at over 350% of capital, leaving earnings sensitive to isolated credit events, as seen in 2025 charge-offs. Geographic concentration in slower-growth markets may constrain loan and deposit expansion. The stock trades at 0.51X book, below peers and near historical norms.

(You can read the full research report on AmeriServ Financial here >>> )

Story Continues

Shares of Apple have gained +12.8% over the past year against the Zacks Computer - Micro Computers industry’s gain of +13.7%. The company is benefiting from strong growth in iPhone and Services revenues. AAPL continues to gain momentum in emerging markets India and Greater China reported strong fiscal first quarter growth driven by iPhone.

Apple now has more than 1 billion paid subscribers across its Services portfolio and 2.5 billion active devices. Expanding capabilities of AI Intelligence is noteworthy. Apple expects the March quarter’s net sales to grow between 13% and 16% on a year-over-year basis despite constrained iPhone supply. Services are expected to grow at the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025 rate.

However, gross margins are expected to be 48-49% in the second quarter of fiscal 2026. Increasing regulatory headwinds and stiff competition are major concerns for the iPhone-maker.

Meta’s shares have declined -4.7% over the past year against the Zacks Internet - Software industry’s decline of -11%. The company is benefiting from increasing AI-infusion across its services which currently reach more than 3.58 billion people daily. META’s improved recommendation system is driving up user engagement. Instagram Reels had a strong fourth-quarter, with watch time up more than 30% year-over-year in the United States.

Facebook video time continued to grow double-digits year-over-year in the United States. Recommendation improvement drove 20% lift in time spent on Threads. AI usage is making META a popular name among advertisers.

Meta Platforms now expects to invest significantly more over the next few years in developing more advanced models and the largest AI services in the world. However, monetization of these AI services will take considerable time, which is a concern. Increasing regulatory challenges is a headwind for investors

(You can read the full research report on Meta here >>> )

Shares of Chevron have gained +31.2% over the past year against the Zacks Oil and Gas - Integrated - International industry’s gain of +38.8%. The company’s portfolio is strengthening, but risks keep the outlook balanced. The Hess acquisition adds high-quality assets in Guyana, the Bakken, and the Gulf of America, lifting long-term production visibility and free cash flow potential.

Even with weak oil prices, free cash flow grew sharply in 2025, supported by cost discipline, asset quality, and steady operations. Deepwater projects like Ballymore and Whale, along with a dominant Permian position, underpin medium-term growth, while ongoing efficiency gains are lowering breakevens.

But execution and geopolitical risks remain, as seen at Tengiz, while Venezuela upside depends on policy clarity. Downstream and chemicals face margin pressure, valuation is elevated versus peers, and energy transition progress trails Europe. Taken together, these factors support a Neutral view on CVX stock.

(You can read the full research report on Chevron here >>> )

Investors Title’s shares have declined -7.4% over the past year against the Zacks Insurance - Property and Casualty industry’s decline of -8.3%. This microcap company with a market capitalization of $406.81 million has risks that remain material. The business is highly cyclical and tied to real estate volumes, with significant geographic concentration. Rising operating costs could pressure margins. Investment income volatility adds further downside risk. The company's valuation appears reasonable (6.68X EV/EBITDA), below industry peers.

Nevertheless, Investors Title’s earnings have strengthened meaningfully, with revenues rising to $272.8 million in 2025 and margins expanding to 12.9%, reflecting improved operating leverage and earnings quality. Core title premiums continue to grow across both agency and direct channels, signaling durable franchise demand.

The 2026 backdrop is supportive, with improving mortgage activity and lower rates, while recent state rate hikes (notably in NC) provide incremental revenue upside. A strong balance sheet and cash generation enhance flexibility, supporting dividends and buybacks.

(You can read the full research report on Investors Title here >>> )

This microcap company with a market capitalization of $62.1 million is supported by improving core earnings momentum in 2025, driven by a 17% rise in net interest income and margin expansion to 3.15%, reflecting better asset yields and funding costs.

Balance sheet strength improved as deposit growth reduced reliance on higher-cost borrowings, positioning the bank with a more stable, lower-cost funding base entering 2026. news.Title: February shipments of foreign-branded phones in China fall 7.7% from a year ago, CAICT data shows
news.Content:
BEIJING, March 25 (Reuters) - Shipments of foreign-branded ‌mobile phones in ‌China for February, including Apple 's ​iPhones, fell 7.7% from the same month last year, Reuters calculations ‌based on ⁠data released by a government-affiliated research ⁠firm on Wednesday showed.

The data from the ​China Academy ​of ​Information and ‌Communications Technology showed shipments of foreign-branded phones within China were at 2.4 million units in ‌February.

More from Yahoo Scout

What caused foreign phone shipments to decline in China?

What was China's overall mobile phone market performance?

How did Apple iPhone sales perform in February?

How significant was the foreign brand decline compared to overall market?

Overall phone ​shipments in ​China ​in February were ‌down 14.6% year-on-year ​to ​16.8 million units, according to the data.

(Reporting ​by ‌Xiuhao Chen and Liz ​Lee; Editing by ​Christian Schmollinger)

news.Title: 【Follow法人】外資回補363億元！狂掃這5檔主動式ETF 倒貨華邦電5.6萬張居冠
news.Content:
（下午4時30分更新外資買賣超個股）

台股今（25）日勁揚逾800點，三大法人聯袂買超507.59億元，外資終結連4賣，轉為買超363.28億元。其中，外資買超前十名排行當中，即有主動統一台股增長（00981A）等5檔主動式ETF入列；主要賣超股則有記憶體股華邦電（2344）5.6萬張居冠。

外資今日買超前三大個股：群益台灣精選高息、主動復華未來50、主動元大AI新經濟

外資狂掃群益台灣精選高息（00919）2萬3,930張；並依序敲進主動式ETF主動復華未來50（00991A）2萬3,286張、主動元大AI新經濟（00990A）2萬3,181張、主動統一台股增長（00981A）2萬2,177張，主動群益科技創新（00992A）1萬4,910張，以及主動群益台灣強棒（00982A）1萬1,817張。

外資今日賣超前三大個股：華邦電、力積電、瑞軒

記憶體族群先前淪殺盤重心，今日出現止跌回神。華邦電雖盤中力拚翻紅，但尾盤賣壓湧現，收跌逾1.3%，外資今倒貨5萬6,510萬張，累計2個交易日遭砍7.1萬張；並同步調節力積電同2萬2,096張。

此外，光電股瑞軒（2489）早盤一度亮燈漲停，外資則是由賣轉賣，賣超1萬5,873張，居台股第三大。

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日合計買超507.59億元，外資前四個交易日累計砍台股2274.88億元，今日回頭買超363.28億元。

投信續站買方，買超12.89億元；自營商買超131.42億元，其中自行買賣部分買超35.8億元，避險方面買超95.62億元。

台股今日走揚，終場大漲826.87點，收在33439.11點，漲幅2.54%，成交金額為6247.11億元。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

自營商買超131.42億元，投信買超12.89億元，外資及陸資買超363.27億元。1150325

news.Title: 台股量縮強彈826點 三大法人同步站多買超507.59億元
news.Content:
受惠美國總統川普喊話戰事即將結束，帶動台股今 (25) 日上演絕地大反攻，開盤上漲 113.03 點後一路狂飆，終場收 33,439.11 點，上漲 826.87 點，創史上第 7 大漲點，站回 5 日、10 日均線，但月線得而復失，成交量進一步縮 6247.11 億元；三大法人合計賣超 507.59 億元。

觀察三大法人今天籌碼動向，外資買超 507.59 億，終結連四賣；自營商買超 131.42 億元；投信買超 12.89 億元；三大法人合計買超 507.59 億元。

news.Title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, Apple and Microsoft
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – March 25, 2026 – Zacks.com announces the list of stocks featured in the Analyst Blog. Every day the Zacks Equity Research analysts discuss the latest news and events impacting stocks and the financial markets. Stocks recently featured in the blog include: Lockheed Martin LMT, Northrop Grumman NOC, Apple AAPL and Microsoft MSFT.

Here are highlights from Tuesday’s Analyst Blog:

Investing During War: Stocks, Gold, Commodities & Crypto

Geopolitical conflicts and wars have repeatedly shaken financial markets, often triggering sharp selloffs, spikes in oil prices and widespread investor panic. One of the most well-known recent examples was the Russia-Ukraine war in 2022, when global markets fell sharply, energy prices surged, inflation accelerated and recession fears spread across major economies.

The S&P 500 dropped by around 5-10% during the invasion span. The war triggered a global energy crisis, slashed global trade growth and cost the global economy an estimated $1.3 trillion in 2022, creating massive inflation and supply chain shocks (Business Standard).

History Shows Markets Recover

Within a year, many global markets had, however, recovered a large portion of their losses and several sectors such as energy, defense and commodities delivered strong returns. Similar patterns were observed during the COVID-19 market crash, the Gulf War, the Iraq War and even after the 9/11 attacks. Markets initially declined due to uncertainty but later stabilized as economies adjusted, supply chains reorganized and governments introduced policy support.

Core Principle of Investing: Markets Fall on Uncertainty but Rise on Time

This pattern highlights an important investing reality. Periods of uncertainty often push investors toward cash and defensive assets, but they also create opportunities for long-term investors willing to accumulate assets at lower valuations. Markets tend to recover, economies adjust and investors who deploy capital during periods of fear often generate the strongest long-term returns.

As of now, global markets are again facing geopolitical uncertainty related to Middle East tensions involving Iran, Israel and the United States, along with rising oil prices, inflation concerns and increased volatility across equities and bonds. The short-term outlook remains uncertain and geopolitical clarity may take months or longer. However, long-term investing has never depended on geopolitical clarity, it has depended on strategic asset allocation and time in the market.

Story Continues

Wealth Built by Investing During Uncertainty, Not During Euphoria

Long-term investors who continue investing during downturns often outperform those who try to time the market. Historical data shows that if you invested in the S&P 500 (including dividends reinvested) in 1926, the annualized return through 2026 is about 10.41% per year, despite wars, recessions, crises and pandemics (S&P 500 Official Data).

A smart strategy right now is asset allocation across multiple asset classes, rather than betting on a single market direction.

Below are three asset classes investors can consider in the current environment.

Sector-Specific and Broad Market Equities

During geopolitical conflicts and war-driven market downturns, not all equities move in the same direction. While broad markets often decline due to uncertainty, certain sectors such as defense, energy, infrastructure and cybersecurity tend to perform relatively better due to increased government spending and rising energy demand.

Companies like Lockheed Martin , Northrop Grumman , ExxonMobil and Chevron often benefit during such periods. At the same time, broad market equities and large-cap companies like Apple and Microsoft provide long-term growth opportunities when markets fall. A gradual, systematic investment approach during downturns is often more effective than trying to time the market bottom.

Gold and Commodities

Gold and commodities have historically acted as hedges during geopolitical uncertainty, inflation and currency volatility because wars often disrupt supply chains, energy routes and global trade. In 2026, Middle East tensions pushed oil prices higher and increased volatility across commodities, while gold and silver saw strong safe-haven demand during peak uncertainty.

Commodities such as crude oil, natural gas, gold, silver, copper and agricultural products often rise during geopolitical shocks and inflationary periods. Including commodities in a portfolio helps diversify risk because commodities sometimes perform well when equity markets are volatile, making them useful for asset allocation during uncertain global environments.

Cryptocurrency (High Risk, Small Allocation)

Cryptocurrency has emerged as a new alternative asset class over the past decade. In some geopolitical situations, crypto assets have seen increased demand due to currency instability, capital controls, inflation concerns and distrust in traditional financial systems. Major cryptocurrencies are often viewed as long-term digital assets, while others are linked to blockchain infrastructure and decentralized applications.

In early 2026, major cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and Ethereum were highly volatile and declined during market sell-offs. However, such corrections are common in crypto markets and often create long-term accumulation opportunities. Historically, many of Bitcoin’s strongest long-term gains have come after major corrections, which is why long-term investors often use market declines to gradually accumulate rather than invest during euphoric rallies. The key with crypto is “position sizing”, a small allocation that can add potential high growth to a portfolio without significantly increasing overall portfolio risk.

Today you can access their live picks without cost or obligation.

news.Title: Qualcomm Is Down 24% in 2026 and Just Announced a $20 Billion Buyback. Is That Bullish or a Warning Sign?
news.Content:
It's been a challenging start to 2026 for Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) . The memory shortage is impacting the company's smartphone component sales, which is its core business. Its partnership with Apple could also end this year, as the tech giant is developing its own custom-designed modem chips to avoid relying on Qualcomm.

Due to the negative news, Qualcomm's stock is down 25% year to date as of March 23. But it recently announced authorization of a $20 billion share buyback -- a sizable sum considering its market cap of $140 billion -- and raised its quarterly dividend from $0.89 to $0.92. Qualcomm was already one of the top dividend stocks in the tech sector, and it will now be paying out even more.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Buybacks and dividend hikes can either be a sign of management's confidence or an attempt to stop the bleeding. Let's see if this looks more like the former or the latter.

Qualcomm is still in a good financial position

This setup isn't a company stretching itself financially to buy back shares or pay a hefty dividend, as Qualcomm can afford both. It has a solid balance sheet, with $7.2 billion in cash and cash equivalents at the end of last year. Long-term debt is manageable at $14.8 billion, and Qualcomm has generated $12.9 billion in trailing free cash flow.

Qualcomm also showed promising developments in the first quarter of its 2026 fiscal year, which ended Dec. 28, 2025. It delivered record revenue of $12.3 billion, but what was most important was where that revenue came from. Automotive revenue jumped 15% year over year to $1.1 billion, and Internet of Things (IoT) revenue increased 9% to $1.7 billion. Smartphones remain the biggest revenue stream, but the automotive and IoT numbers show that Qualcomm is having some success diversifying its business.

The verdict: Moderately bullish, with a few caveats

Qualcomm looks cheap right now, especially compared to tech stocks in general, as it's trading at 12 times forward earnings. Considering that low multiple and the company's strong cash flow, this buyback looks like a way to scoop up shares while prices are low and return value to investors.

The glass-half-empty outlook would be that the memory shortage is a serious issue, Apple is planning to move on from its Qualcomm partnership, and the buyback is simply because management doesn't see anything better to do with the money. Revenue guidance for next quarter also failed to impress at $10.2 billion to $11.0 billion.

Story Continues

While those are all issues, my main concern with Qualcomm is its lackluster long-term track record. Since CEO Cristiano Amon took over in 2021, Qualcomm has delivered a total return of 11% to shareholders. The S&P 500 returned 79% over the same time period. Going back 10 years, Qualcomm has returned 229% compared to 276% for the S&P 500.

The buyback is a sign that Qualcomm may be undervalued at the moment. However, I'd personally hold off on investing for now, at least until seeing more progress in automotive and IoT revenue.
news.AI_Summary:
• Qualcomm's smartphone component sales are impacted by a memory shortage, and its partnership with Apple may end.
• The company announced a $20 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend, indicating financial stability with $7.2B cash and $12.9B free cash flow.
• Automotive revenue grew 15% to $1.1B and IoT revenue increased 9% to $1.7B, showing diversification efforts.
• The stock trades at 12x forward earnings, considered cheap, but long-term shareholder returns have lagged the S&P 500 since 2021.
news.Keywords: memory shortage, share buyback, dividend increase, revenue diversification, valuation

Automotive revenue jumped 15% year over year to $1.1 billion, and Internet of Things (IoT) revenue increased 9% to $1.7 billion. Smartphones remain the biggest revenue stream, but the automotive and IoT numbers show that Qualcomm is having some success diversifying its business.

The verdict: Moderately bullish, with a few caveats

Qualcomm looks cheap right now, especially compared to tech stocks in general, as it's trading at 12 times forward earnings. Considering that low multiple and the company's strong cash flow, this buyback looks like a way to scoop up shares while prices are low and return value to investors.

The glass-half-empty outlook would be that the memory shortage is a serious issue, Apple is planning to move on from its Qualcomm partnership, and the buyback is simply because management doesn't see anything better to do with the money. Revenue guidance for next quarter also failed to impress at $10.2 billion to $11.0 billion.

Story Continues

While those are all issues, my main concern with Qualcomm is its lackluster long-term track record. Since CEO Cristiano Amon took over in 2021, Qualcomm has delivered a total return of 11% to shareholders. The S&P 500 returned 79% over the same time period. Going back 10 years, Qualcomm has returned 229% compared to 276% for the S&P 500.

The buyback is a sign that Qualcomm may be undervalued at the moment. However, I'd personally hold off on investing for now, at least until seeing more progress in automotive and IoT revenue.
news.AI_Summary:
• Qualcomm's smartphone component sales are impacted by a memory shortage, and its partnership with Apple may end.
• The company announced a $20 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend, indicating financial stability with $7.2B cash and $12.9B free cash flow.
• Automotive revenue grew 15% to $1.1B and IoT revenue increased 9% to $1.7B, showing diversification efforts.
• The stock trades at 12x forward earnings, considered cheap, but long-term shareholder returns have lagged the S&P 500 since 2021.
news.Keywords: memory shortage, share buyback, dividend increase, revenue diversification, valuation

news.Title: 三大利空到齊！分析師示警：標普500今年恐現兩位數跌幅
news.Content:
DataTrek 共同創辦人 Nicholas Colas 警告，歷史上導致標普 500 指數暴跌兩位數的三大核心因素，在 2026 年已全數出現。

他周二 (24 日) 說：「美股全年表現不佳通常源於特定因素，而非僅是運氣不佳，或投資情緒的隨機波動。」

三大利空：衰退、戰爭、政策轉向

Colas 回溯自 1928 年以來的歷史數據，找出標普 500 指數含股利再投入計算後總報酬損失至少 10% 的 12 個年度，結果發現，「經濟衰退」、「軍事衝突」以及「聯準會 (Fed) 貨幣政策的意外轉向」是導致美股重挫的主因。這當中又以「經濟衰退」最常見，在 12 次案例中占了八次。

Colas 說：「股市目前正在驚恐狀態，因為這三個因素正同時發生。」

中東戰火短期內沒有結束跡象、原油價格飆升，不僅可能引發經濟衰退，更推升通膨壓力，讓 Fed 陷入兩難。他預警，衝突持續愈久，Fed 被迫升息的可能性就愈高，且升息幅度難以預料。

估值過高削弱抗跌能力

報告也指出，美股目前的估值與歷史衰退年份相比明顯偏高：衡量長期估值的「席勒本益比」(Shiller P/E) 目前高達 37.5 倍，相比之下，在過去因經濟衰退導致股市雙位數跌幅的年份當中，其年初的平均席勒本益比僅為 21.3 倍。

Colas 指出，當股市在統計上處於「便宜」水位時，經濟衰退引發美股出現超過 10% 跌幅的機率仍較低。然而，儘管美股過去幾個月已有所修正，目前看來依舊昂貴，代表市場面對衝擊時極為脆弱。

3 月表現恐創一年來最差

在美以聯軍 2 月 28 日對伊朗發動空襲之後，美股 3 月表現欲振乏力，根據 FactSet 數據，標普 500 指數本月已下跌 4.7%，可能創下 2025 年 3 月以來最大單月跌幅，且正邁向 2025 年第 1 季以來首見單季虧損——該指數今年來到周二收盤累計下跌 4.2%。

儘管利空罩頂，Colas 仍對 2026 年抱持一絲樂觀，認為若中東局勢能迅速降溫並促使油價回落，仍有機會避免全年出現兩位數虧損。

他建議想規避風險的投資人配置在黃金上。黃金最近雖然陷入熊市 (從高點回跌 20%)，但歷史證明在美股承受壓力時期，黃金仍是最強的避險工具。
news.AI_Summary:
• 分析師警告，標普500指數今年恐出現兩位數跌幅，因經濟衰退、軍事衝突及政策轉向三大空頭因素同時出現。
• 歷史數據顯示，經濟衰退是導致美股重挫最常見的原因，佔12次案例中的八次。
• 目前美股估值偏高，席勒本益比高達37.5倍，遠高於過去衰退年份的平均21.3倍，市場脆弱性高。
• 受中東衝突影響，標普500指數3月已下跌4.7%，可能創一年來最大單月跌幅，並可能出現首季虧損。
• 若中東局勢迅速降溫，仍有機會避免全年兩位數虧損，建議投資人配置黃金避險。
news.Keywords: 經濟衰退,軍事衝突,政策轉向,估值過高,避險

news.Title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Micron, Five Below and Compania de Minas Buenaventura
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – March 25, 2026 – Stocks in this week’s article are Micron Technology, Inc. MU, Five Below, Inc. FIVE and Compania de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. BVN.

Up Over 100%: 3 High Momentum Stocks to Buy Right Away

A proven way to identify the strongest momentum stocks is by applying the principle of “buy high and sell higher" investment philosophy, a successful investment approach that helped Richard Driehaus earn a place on Barron’s All-Century Team.

With that in mind, stocks like Micron Technology, Inc ., Five Below, Inc . and Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A . have been identified as today’s top momentum picks using the Driehaus strategy. Shares of Micron, Five Below and Buenaventura have already gained 328.8%, 199.7% and 104.4%, respectively, over the past year.

A Detailed Look Into the Driehaus Strategy

Regarding the strategy, Driehaus once said: “I would much rather invest in a stock that’s increasing in price and take the risk that it may begin to decline than invest in a stock that’s already in decline and try to guess when it will turn around.” In line with this insight, the American Association of Individual Investors (“AAII”) considered the 50-day moving average as one of the key criteria when creating a portfolio in line with Driehaus’ philosophy.

It is calculated by dividing the numerator (month-end price minus 50-day moving average of month-end price) by the 50-day moving average of the month-end price. Another momentum indicator — positive relative strength — has also been included in this strategy. A positive percentage 50-day moving average indicates that the stock is trading at a price higher than its 50-day moving average level, indicating an uptrend.

Moreover, AAII found that Driehaus primarily focuses on strong earnings growth rates and impressive earnings projections to pick potential outperformers. Companies with a strong history of beating estimates are also given importance in this strategy, which was made to provide better returns over the long term.

Here are three of the 17 stocks:

Micron Technology

Micron Technology is a provider of memory and storage products worldwide. It has a Momentum Score of A. The trailing four-quarter earnings surprise for MU is 21.7%, on average (read more: Top 2 Profitable Stocks to Buy Right Now (NVDA, MU)).

Five Below

Five Below is a U.S.-based specialty retailer focused on offering value-priced products. It has a Momentum Score of A. The trailing four-quarter earnings surprise for FIVE is 63.4%, on average (read more: 3 Strong Earnings Growth Stocks You'll Wish You Bought Sooner).

Story Continues

Buenaventura

Buenaventura explores, mines and markets polymetallic ores and metals in Peru. It has a Momentum Score of A. The trailing four-quarter earnings surprise for BVN is 80.4%, on average.

news.Title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: NVIDIA, Fastly, SK Telecom, Zoom and Circle Group
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – March 25, 2026 – Today, Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights NVIDIA NVDA, Fastly FSLY, SK Telecom SKM, Zoom ZM and Circle Group CRCL.

3 "Backdoor" Agentic AI Stocks to Buy Now

Generative AI Started the Show; Agentic AI is Stealing It

OpenAI’s launch of ChatGPT in late 2022 was a pivotal moment for the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution. ChatGPT quickly became the fastest-growing consumer application in history, proving the power of AI technology and showing that AI could be more than an abstract, behind-the-scenes technology and more of a mass market, investible technology. However, like the 1994 launch of Netscape, ChatGPT is unlikely to be the end of the technological wave, but a spark that ignites even more impressive technology.

In 2026, “Agentic AI” is stealing the show and proving that it’s the next big wave of the AI revolution. Unlike generative AI Chatbots such as ‘Gemini’ and ‘ChatGPT’ that require human queries and supervision, Agentic AI systems can accomplish a specific goal with limited supervision. Below are two examples of the differences between Agentic and Generative AI:

· Travel Booking: A Chatbot can write a travel itinerary for you. Agentic AI can log into your apps, find flights, compare prices, and book hotels.

· Customer Service: Generative AI can handle a response to a lost package email (if prompted). Agentic AI can track the box’s location, apply the company’s refund rules, verify a customer’s loyalty status, and process any necessary refunds or new shipments.

2026: The Year of the Agentic AI Breakthrough

Thus far in 2026, the software sector has lost hundreds of millions in market cap. Investors have taken a “sell first, ask questions later” approach amid fears that Agentic AI models like Anthropic’s Claude will make companies less dependent on expensive, legacy software subscriptions. Meanwhile, OpenClaw launched in January 2026.

The self-hosted AI agent can execute tasks directly from messaging apps such as WhatsApp, Telegram, and Slack. Unlike traditional LLMs that merely generate text responses, OpenClaw can read and write files, browse the web, and interact with other applications, all while running 24 hours a day, seven days a week. As a result of these breakthroughs, searches for “Agentic AI” have soared recently.

Agentic AI: A Multi-Trillion-Dollar Opportunity

Although Agentic AI has soared in popularity in 2026, it has a long investing runway, which is in the early innings. In March, NVIDIA’s iconic CEO Jensen Huang said, “The world is now awakened to the Agentic AI inflection… Agentic AI has reached an inflection point, and it literally happened in the last two or three months.” Huang also says that he sees Agentic AI as a “multi-trillion-dollar opportunity.”

Story Continues

3 Stocks Riding the Agentic AI Inflection Point

Fastly: Fastly, an infrastructure software company, has proven to be an early winner of the Agentic AI revolution. The company’s technology helps AI agents handle “agentic traffic.” Meanwhile, Varnish, its web accelerator, lowers latency and bandwidth costs for Agentic AI tasks. Although FSLY shares are extended (up150% over the past two months), investors should watch for a pullback. Zacks Consensus Estimates see the company doubling its YoY EPS in 2026 (and this is probably a conservative estimate).

SK Telecom: Privately held Anthropic is considered the pioneer and leader in the Agentic AI industry because its technology is at the forefront of enabling AI to operate computers directly, like a human. Although Anthropic is private, South Korean telecom giant SKM provides a backdoor means for investors to gain exposure.

In the summer of 2023, SKM invested $100 million into Anthropic when the company had a $5 billion valuation. Today, Anthropic’s valuation is said to be closer to $400 billion (and rapidly ascending). SKM shares currently offer investors a juicy reward-to-risk setup as they pull back uniformly to the rising 50-day moving average.

While other public companies like Zoom hold stakes, SKM’s Anthropic purchase was both early and sizable.

Circle Group: Circle Group manages the world’s second-largest stablecoin – USDC. USDC is a regulated, fiat-backed stablecoin pegged 1:1 with the US Dollar. USDC is the early favorite to be the preferred Agentic AI payment method because of its:

· Programmability: USDC can be programmed to make payments via smart contracts.

· 24/7 Usability: Unlike traditional payment methods, USDC transactions can be processed 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

· Cost and Speed: USDC transactions process nearly instantaneously and at a fraction of the cost of legacy financial institutions.

Bottom Line

The Agentic AI revolution is a multi-trillion-dollar investment opportunity. While many of the top Agentic AI companies are held privately, public investors can find backdoor means to invest in them.

news.Title: 《日股》半導體飆、日經衝1,497點；任天堂跌
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-03-25 14:35:52 蔡承啟 發佈

因市場期待美伊有望達成停戰協議、投資人信心改善，日本半導體相關股飆漲，激勵日經225指數25日開高走高，終場大漲2.87%(漲1,497.34點)，收53,749.62點，連續第2個交易日走揚。

東證股價指數(TOPIX)終場大漲2.57%(漲91.32點)，收3,650.99點，連續第2個交易日走揚。

東證Prime今日上漲家數1,458家、下跌家數107家、維持平盤家數15家。東證Prime今日成交額為7兆431億日圓。

就類股表現來看，全部33類股中僅礦業類股下跌、其餘32類股盡數上漲，其中以保險業類股漲幅最大，其次依序為非鐵金屬、玻璃土石製品和銀行業。

根據MoneyDJ XQ全球贏家系統的報價顯示，截至日本股市25日收盤(台北時間14點30分)為止，日圓相對於美元匯率貶值0.24%至159.02日圓兌1美元；日圓相對於美元匯率24日貶值0.13%、3個交易日來第2度走貶。

日本半導體相關股飆漲。晶片設備巨擘東京威力科創(TEL)大漲3.14%、測試設備商愛德萬測試(Advantest)飆漲4.83%、晶圓切割機廠DISCO大漲3.96%、成膜設備商KOKUSAI狂飆7.36%。 日本晶片設備銷售續增，2月份銷售額續破4,000億日圓、創下同期歷史新高紀錄。

任天堂跌0.04%。 去年年末旺季需求遜色，任天堂傳出減產Switch 2遊戲機、本季(1-3月)產量大砍200萬台。

日本黃金ETF「Mitsubishi UFJ Trust Gold ETF(Japan Physical Gold ETF；1540.JP)」飆漲5.13%。 日本黃金期貨價格今日飆漲、觸發「熔斷機制」。

(圖片來源：Shutterstock)

＊編者按：本文僅供參考之用，並不構成要約、招攬或邀請、誘使、任何不論種類或形式之申述或訂立任何建議及推薦，讀者務請運用個人獨立思考能力，自行作出投資決定，如因相關建議招致損失，概與《精實財經媒體》、編者及作者無涉。

《日韓股》日經指數下跌3.48% 韓股下跌6.49%

《歐股》美伊戰事陷膠著、油價揚 歐股上週收黑

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

• 受美伊有望達成停戰協議預期提振，日本股市25日大漲2.87%，日經225指數收53,749.62點。
• 半導體相關股飆漲，東京威力科創、愛德萬測試、DISCO、KOKUSAI等漲幅均超過3%。
• 日本2月晶片設備銷售額創同期歷史新高。

news.Title: 《韓股》局勢降溫預期 KOSPI指數上漲1.59%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-03-25 14:34:03 黃文章 發佈

韓國股市週三上漲，媒體報導川普政府對伊朗提出停火方案，油價也重新回落。韓國綜合股價指數（KOSPI）3月25日收盤上漲1.59%或88.29點，收5,642.21點。

統計數據顯示，由於人口老齡化與萎縮，以及農曆新年假期減少搬遷活動，南韓2月遷居人口數量較去年同期下降11.5%。根據韓國統計廳的數據，2月約有61萬5,000人更換住所，較去年同期減少8萬人。

在人口老齡化與萎縮的背景下，搬遷人數長期呈現下降趨勢。短期而言，該數字亦受到房地產交易量及新建公寓供給的影響。數據顯示，人口流動率（即每100人中遷居的人口比例）較去年同期下降2個百分點至15.7%。

週三公佈的數據顯示，在結婚數增加的帶動下，1月出生嬰兒數量以七年來最快速度上升。根據韓國統計廳的數據，1月共有26,916名嬰兒出生，較去年同期增加11.7%。統計廳表示，這是自2019年（當時出生30,271名嬰兒）以來1月的最高數據，並指出出生人數正逐步回升至疫情前水平。

韓國的總生育率（即女性一生平均預期生育子女數）較去年同期上升0.1，於1月達到0.99。統計廳表示，近期出生數增加似乎受到結婚數持續上升、政府支持生育政策，以及30歲出頭女性人口增加的影響。數據顯示，1月結婚數較去年同期大幅增加12.4%至22,640對，為連續第22個月成長。

週三政府數據顯示，在農曆新年假期帶動的強勁消費需求推動下，線下零售企業2月營收較去年同期大幅成長14.1%。韓國產業通商資源部表示，受惠於節日期間對食品雜貨的強勁需求（農曆新年落在2月中旬），大型超市銷售額年增15.1%。這是大型超市自10月以來首次出現年增成長。

百貨公司營收則大幅增加25.6%，主要受食品與服飾銷售激增帶動，並將連續成長紀錄延續至第八個月。便利商店營收年增8.1%，同樣連續第八個月成長，主要受加工食品需求強勁支撐。主要線上零售平台營收成長3.9%，由食品與化妝品銷售成長帶動。整體而言，線上與線下零售商2月總營收較去年同期成長7.9%。

三星電子(Samsung Electronics)(005930.KS)下跌0.37%至189,000韓元。電池大廠LG新能源(LG Energy Solution)(373220.KS)上漲0.38%至394,000韓元。DRAM巨擘SK海力士(SK Hynix)(000660.KS)上漲0.91%至995,000韓元。

（圖片來源：MoneyDJ理財網資料庫）

news.Title: 台積電之後首見！台達電收1550元新天價 成台股唯二「4兆元企業」
news.Content:
台股二哥台達電（2308）今（25）日股價狂拉，盤中再度寫下新天價1555元，也將市值推上4兆元大關，觸及4.03兆元，收盤站穩1550元，成為繼台積電之後，台股史上第二家4兆元企業。

在美伊戰爭有望啟動談判之下，台股今日迎來強勢反彈，不過今日焦點並非護國神山台積電，而是台股二哥台達電，不僅飆出新高價，更登台股唯二「4兆股」。

台達電今日也在盤中強漲9.5%，股價衝上新天價1550元，也帶動市值再度寫下全新里程碑，正式突破4兆元大關。

除站穩台股二哥地位，台達電也成為目前台股唯二闖關4兆市值的企業，上一個企業則是目前台股權王台積電。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

• 台達電成為繼台積電之後，台股史上第二家市值突破4兆元的企業。

news.Title: 【台股盤後】電金傳齊走強　台股上揚826點寫歷史第7大漲點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年3月25日電）台股今天在電子、金融以及多數傳統產業股走強推升下，加權指數開高走高，終場上漲826.87點，為歷史第7大收盤漲點，收在33439.11點，收復5日均線33201點，成交值縮小至新台幣6247.11億元。

台積電 (2330) 收在1845元，上漲35元，市值攀升至47.84兆元，貢獻大盤約278點。其餘權值股台達電 (2308) 、鴻海 (2317) 、日月光投控 (3711) 以及高價股信驊 (5274) 等走高，帶動整體電子類股指數上揚2.81%。

宜鼎 (5289) 、亞德客-KY (1590) 股價登上1000元大關，台股出現38千金。觀察萬潤 (6187) 、漢唐 (2404) 、華城 (1519) 、金像電 (2368) 和勤誠 (8210) 股價收在900元以上，台股千金股陣容可望進一步壯大。

金融股類股指數上揚1.51%。傳產股多數收高，塑膠類股指數上揚逾2%，機電、電纜和玻璃類股指數上揚逾3%，橡膠類股指數下跌逾1%，表現相對疲弱。

兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉表示，近期市場不確定性高，隨著消息面波動，油價是牽動股市走向的關鍵因素，也是市場關注的重要指標。
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股25日受電子、金融及多數傳產股走強推升，加權指數上漲826.87點，為歷史第7大收盤漲點，收在33439.11點。
• 台積電收在1845元，上漲35元，市值攀升至47.84兆元，貢獻大盤約278點。
• 台達電、鴻海、日月光投控、信驊等權值股及高價股走高，帶動電子類股指數上揚2.81%。
• 金融股類股指數上揚1.51%，傳產股多數收高，塑膠、機電、電纜和玻璃類股指數上揚逾3%。
• 兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉表示，油價是牽動股市走向的關鍵因素。
news.Keywords: 電子股,金融股,傳產股,權值股,油價

news.Title: 小資一萬元入場！統一推00403A 主動布局台股升級戰
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱報導

台股就像一場永不停歇的網球賽，紅土、草地、硬地各有打法，選手要隨場地變化調整策略；而在資本市場，產業輪動、景氣變化，也考驗投資人的應變能力。

近期主動式ETF再掀話題，國內最大發行商之一的統一投信，繼00981A之後，再推出全新產品「統一台股升級50主動式ETF（00403A）」，主打「市值投資再升級」，不再只是被動跟隨指數，而是透過主動選股，試圖在台股輪動中搶占先機。

根據統計，台股市值前50大企業的產業結構，近5年出現明顯變化。其中半導體依然穩居核心，在AI浪潮帶動下，權重持續攀升，甚至逼近65%；反觀金融股，隨著升息循環結束，動能逐漸轉弱，權重下滑至約一成左右。而傳產如塑膠與運輸，更是明顯被邊緣化。

在這樣快速變動的市場環境下，00403A採取「動態調整」策略，以市值前50大企業為核心，再搭配51到200大的潛力股作為增強池，隨時汰弱留強、加碼強勢族群。這檔ETF預計4月22日到24日募集，發行價10元，主打小資族也能輕鬆參與台股成長機會。不過業者也提醒，主動式ETF並不保證打敗大盤，投資人仍需審慎評估風險。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

• 統一投信推出全新產品「統一台股升級50主動式ETF（00403A）」，主打市值投資再升級，透過主動選股。
• 台股市值前50大企業的產業結構變化明顯，半導體權重逼近65%，金融股權重下滑至約一成。
• 00403A採取「動態調整」策略，以市值前50大企業為核心，搭配51到200大的潛力股。
• ETF預計4月22日到24日募集，發行價10元，小資族也能參與台股成長機會。
• 業者提醒，主動式ETF不保證打敗大盤，投資人仍需審慎評估風險。

news.Title: 台股第二季三劇本曝光！最慘恐下探2萬6 AI撐盤能戰4萬？
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱報導

隨著中東地緣政治風險升溫，全球金融市場不確定性再度攀升。群益金融集團於3月24日舉辦「2026年第二季投資展望說明會」，由投顧團隊針對全球經濟與台股後市提出分析，並指出「戰爭時間長短」，將成為影響第二季台股走勢的關鍵變數。

群益投顧預估，第二季台股指數區間落在31,000至34,000點；不過若美伊戰事延續至6月底之後，指數區間恐下修至26,000至32,000點，市場波動幅度將明顯擴大。

第二種情境則為戰事持續3至6個月，或軍事衝突逐步淡化。在此情況下，國際油價短期內將維持高檔震盪，金融市場波動加劇，台股低點可能出現在第二季。不過隨著美國啟動降息循環，加上期中選舉政策利多，股市有機會逐步回穩並呈現震盪上行。至於最悲觀情境，若戰爭拖延超過6個月，油價持續飆升，恐進一步推升通膨並影響美國利率政策，甚至引發停滯性通膨風險，加上中東局勢牽動全球資金流向，或美國私募信貸問題惡化，市場恐轉入空頭格局。群益投顧指出，在此情境下，台股可能於第二季出現大幅修正，低點延至第三季，並於第四季才有機會反彈。

群益投顧投資展望會。(圖/群益投顧提供)

根據市場預測平台Polymarket資料，美伊戰爭在6月底前結束的機率約達80%，顯示市場普遍預期風險仍可控。不過投顧也提醒，國際政治局勢變數難以預測，資金控管將成為今年投資最重要的關鍵。

在操作策略方面，群益投顧建議，投資人應以風險控管為優先，並提高資金運用效率。在市場急跌時，恐慌性賣壓往往提供較佳進場機會；反之，若出現快速反彈，則應嚴守出場紀律，以短週期操作為主軸，靈活因應市場變化。

選股方面，籌碼穩定性成為關鍵指標。建議優先關注成交量相對溫和、具備投信持續買盤支撐，且股價維持區間整理的個股，此類標的在震盪市場中通常較具抗跌性，並在反彈時具備延續動能。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

原文出處： 台股第二季三劇本曝光！最慘恐下探2萬6 AI撐盤能戰4萬？
news.AI_Summary:
• 群益投顧分析，第二季台股指數區間落在31,000至34,000點，若美伊戰事延續至6月底後，指數區間恐下修至26,000至32,000點。
• 若戰爭拖延超過6個月，油價飆升恐推升通膨，影響Fed利率政策，甚至引發滯漲風險，市場恐轉入空頭格局。
• 市場預期美伊戰爭在6月底前結束機率約80%，顯示風險可控。
• 建議投資人以風險控管為優先，提高資金運用效率，並在市場急跌時尋找進場機會。
• 選股建議關注成交量溫和、具投信買盤支撐且股價區間整理的個股。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治風險,美伊戰爭,通膨,利率政策,風險控管

news.Title: 〈台股盤後〉38千金股重現 創史上第4大漲點915點 美中不足未站穩月線
news.Content:
受惠美國總統川普喊話戰事即將結束，帶動國際油價回跌至百元大關之內，台股今 (25) 日上演絕地大反攻，開盤上漲 113.03 點後一路狂飆，在權王台積電上漲 65 元、台達電、智邦等千金股漲停帶動，終場收 33527.29 點，上漲 915.05 點，創史上第 4 大漲停，站回 5 日、10 日均線，但月線得而復失，成交量進一步縮 6247.11 億元。

電子權值股今日擔綱穩盤要角，台積電 (2330-TW) 上漲 35 元，漲近 2%，收 1845 元；台達電 (2308-TW) 上漲 135 元，漲約 9%，來到 1550 元新高價；日月光投控 (3711-TW) 漲約 5%，鴻海 (2317-TW) 漲約 2%，聯發科 (2454-TW) 持平。

在中東戰事趨緩與權值股大漲的振奮下，千金股多頭氣勢如虹，股王信驊 (5274-TW) 大漲逾 6% 帶動下，盤中高達 11 檔千金股亮燈漲停，包含力旺 (3529-TW)、弘塑 (3131-TW)、嘉澤 (3533-TW)、智邦 (2345-TW) 與致茂 (2360-TW) 等。此外，宜鼎 (5289-TW) 與亞德客 - KY(1590-TW) 盤中雙雙站回千元大關，讓台股重返 38 檔千金股的盛況。

矽光子族群持續走強，聯亞 (3081-TW)、訊芯 - KY(7717-TW)、華星光 (4979-TW)、環宇 - KY(4991-TW)、泰谷 (3339-TW)、眾達 - KY(4977-TW) 亮紅燈，

資金輪動至載板類股，載版三雄部分，欣興 (3037-TW) 與南電 (8046-TW) 雙雙飆上漲停板，景碩 (3189-TW) 盤中也同步強漲超過 8%；玻璃載板族群，富喬 (1815-TW) 漲逾 9%，台玻 (1802-TW) 漲逾 5%。

• 台積電上漲35元，漲近2%，收1845元；台達電上漲135元，漲約9%，來到1550元新高價。
• 股王信驊大漲逾6%，帶動盤中高達11檔千金股亮燈漲停。
• 矽光子族群持續走強，聯亞、訊芯-KY等亮燈漲停。
• 載板三雄欣興、南電雙雙飆上漲停板，景碩盤中強漲超過8%。
news.Keywords: 中東戰事,油價回跌,權值股,千金股,AI供應鏈

news.Title: 切入AI五層蛋糕股 4月易漲傳產股出列
news.Content:
文 ‧ 張興華

輝達 執行長黃仁勳本屆GTC大會釋出重磅訊息─預期Blackwell與下一代Vera Rubin架構 晶片 ，至2027年的訂單營收將達1兆美元，足顯AI基礎設施投資仍快速擴張。 輝達 至明年在手訂單超過1兆美元，正象徵以台積電(2330)為首的 晶片 代工，及AI伺服器等相關供應鏈台廠，樂觀看待至明年的營收也將呈現爆發性成長，對 台股 指數更是有力的支撐保證，即便當前面臨美伊戰爭持續帶來通膨隱憂， 台股 短線亦面臨回檔壓力，但中長線有業績題材做後盾下，仍值得期待，無須恐慌。

2027 輝達 訂單營收目標上兆美元

輝達 (NVDA)今年GTC大會於3月16-19日在美國加州聖荷西(San Jose)舉行，黃仁勳於美國時間16日發表主題演講，他提到在去(2025)年的GTC大會，提出2025年下半年至2026年年底時，Blackwell與Rubin合計銷售金額可達5000億美元。如今在同一地點，他預期Blackwell與下一代Vera Rubin架構 晶片 ，至2027年的訂單營收，有機會達到至少1兆美元。

他強調，去年GTC大會宣佈的5000億美元訂單營收實現了，今年GTC大會提出的1兆美元目標，相信也能實現，足顯目前AI基礎設施投資仍在快速擴張中。況且他所說的1兆美元商機中，尚不包括新一代Groq平台與CPU的單獨銷售業務，亦不包含將於2027年第三季末至第四季初上市的Vera Rubin伺服器。若將其一併納入計算，估計至2027年底， 輝達 整體訂單營收至少再增加3成，即全數約達1.3兆美元規模。

同時，黃仁勳於演講中亦釋出旗下H200伺服器已獲得中國輸入許可，並且已收到來自中方多家客戶的訂單，目前已協調供應鏈廠全力投入量產因應。而這部分的訂單營收，估計全年H200 晶片 ，至少需求達200萬顆，換算全年營收至少約有540億美元，這部分也未在前述1.3兆美元的訂單之內，法人預估統合 輝達 至2027年的潛在訂單實力，估計至少有1.35兆美元的規模。

台廠 輝達 供應鏈大成長可期

理周投研部指出，受AI與高效能運算需求帶動，去年全年台灣對美出口金額達1982.7億美元、年增78%，占總出口比重達30.9%，美國已躍居台灣最大貿易順差國。累計今年前2個月台灣對美出口金額為370.2億美元、年增83%，創歷年同期最高，就單一市場而言，對總出口貢獻增長近5成，穩居最大引擎地位，台廠AI供應鏈更扮演主要貢獻者角色。

另就台灣上市櫃今年前2月的整體營收表現，其中1月份合計營收達4.83兆元、年增28.8%，不僅連續7個月整體營收突破4兆元，更創單月歷史新高紀錄，為史上最強元月營收，其中前5大營收個股皆與AI有關，其中又以台積電與鴻海(2317)表現最突出。另2月份的上市櫃體營收為3.84兆元、月減15.21%，衰退主要受工作天數減少所致，年增為14.3%。分析今年1、2月累計營收表現，主要仍是由電子與部分傳產的營收成長所帶動。

因此，面對 輝達 手中訂單營收至明年爆發性的翻倍成長，法人認為台廠供應鏈將是最大與最直接的受惠者，且隨著 輝達 新一代 晶片 架構推出與Vera Rubin伺服器量產，都與 台股 AI供應鏈連動。

AI五層蛋糕 21台廠分食大餅

理周投研部表示，黃仁勳本次GTC大會中提出「AI五層蛋糕論」，分層中的產業包括能源、 晶片 、基礎設施及應用等五大層面，即從基層的電力、重電、備用電源，至 晶片 先進製程，再到伺服器組件、散熱技術、整機ODM等，一系列的發展，到最終的落地應用，形成完整的AI生態系，同時黃仁勳本次點名全球194家合作夥伴，台廠有21家名列其中。

這亦證明台廠供應鏈廠於各層中都有其角色定位，能夠協助 輝達 在AI領域中，持續保持其無法撼動的領導者地位，這也是黃仁勳於GTC會大結束前一晚，特別為出席大會的供應鏈台廠舉辦「Taiwan Night」的原因。包括鴻海(2317)董事長劉揚偉、緯創(3231)總經理林建勳及緯穎(6669)總經理林威遠等重量級人物出席，將原本的台北「兆元宴」直接搬到聖荷西。

隨著AI應用由聊天機器人升級至更複雜的AI代理(AI agents)，以及自動化應用，目前市場對AI運算能力需求倍增，因應推論需求爆發，黃仁勳本屆大會推出新一代Groq 3架構 晶片 的LPU，由7款 晶片 所組成，將由韓廠三星代工，下半年推出。不過Groq架構 晶片 搭配的記憶體採用SRAM(靜態隨機記憶體)，非目前HBM採用的DRAM。由於SRAM取得容易，且更適合用來提升AI推理的速度。

H200受惠股參閱1328期理周

同時，繼Blackwell與Rubin之後，Feynman為 輝達 研發作為下一代資料中心圖形處理器(GPU)，預計於2028年開始量產，而新一代的Feynman將採用台積電最先進的A16(1.6奈米) 晶片 ，其導入A16 晶片 亦象徵半導體應用上的大躍進，因其採用的超級電軌(SPR)，將是全球最細微的節點技術。

理周投研部認為，無論是 輝達 當前應用的Blackwell與Rubin架構下的AI 晶片 ，或是後續新一代的Feynman 晶片 ，在 晶片 先進製程與封裝(CoWoS)上，台積電仍是AI供應鏈中的最大贏家且無競爭對手，加上中國已開放H200伺服器輸入許可，H200 晶片 也是採用台積電N4製程與先進封裝，這部分理周於2月初1328期的封面故事，已精準預測中國即將開放H200伺服器進口， 台股 相關供應鏈受惠股，詳如當期的「 輝達 H200受惠股出列」封面故事內容。

切入AI五層蛋糕的相關台廠

針對 輝達 本屆GTC大會揭露的「AI五層蛋糕」結構中，所對應 台股 供應鏈的主要角色，根據國泰投信ETF研究機構分析，能源層部分為台達電(2308)與光寶科(2301)； 晶片 層為台積電；IC設計層為聯發科(2454)及世芯-KY(3661)；材料供應層為載板廠欣興(3037)；基礎設施層部分，包括伺服器ODM廠的鴻海、廣達(2382)及緯創(3231)，散熱系統的奇鋐(3017)等，皆在AI生態鏈中扮演關鍵角色。

除此，封裝與封測的日月光(3711)、京元電(2449)也是AI 晶片 需求倍增下的直接受惠股，另測試介面在矽光子CPO領域部分，包括旺矽(6223)、穎崴(6515)、聯亞(3081)，及光通訊的波若威(3163)、光聖(6442)及上詮(3363)等，在高精密 晶片 上光測與傳導上亦扮演吃重角色。

戰爭影響擴大 拉回找買點

美伊戰爭持續與影響層面擴大，衝擊全球金融體系， 台股 自然無法置身於外，但差別在AI浪潮推升下，對AI基礎設施需求並未停歇，且需求呈現倍增的情況，台廠供應鏈在AI運算加速升級的生態系中，扮演不可或缺的地位，更是支撐 台股 走勢的堅實後盾。 台股 現階段遭受中東戰事影響短線受挫難免，但戰爭終有結束時，從AI產業成長趨勢動能來看，展望 台股 中長線發展仍然可期，投資人不妨趁 台股 大幅回檔修正之際，尋找好的買點，在 輝達 上兆美元商機中的供應鍵個股，及早做中線以上的佈局。

news.Title: 史上第七大漲幅！台股終場上揚826.87點　台積電漲35元
news.Content:
即時中心／顏一軒報導

美國總統川普（Donald J. Trump）川普聲稱，伊朗有意與美國達成和平協議，台股今（25）日開盤上漲113.03點，開在32725.27點，隨後一路走揚，終場上漲826.87點，收在33439.11點，漲幅2.54%，成交金額為6247.11億元。

news.Title: 《盤後解析》量縮強漲 黃文清：正向看4月再戰高、待外資歸隊
news.Content:
【時報記者葉時安台北報導】周二美股三大指數震盪收黑，不過費半逆勢走穩漲1.28%。周三台股開漲113.03點報32725.27點，雙王強勁，權王台積電(2330)領軍電子股、股王信驊(5274)強漲半根漲停也領頭28席千金股，加上低軌衛星、矽光子、AI、PCB、被動元件、玻陶、重電、先進封測等上攻助威，記憶體同樣回神，推升台股強漲至33705.75盤中最高、上漲1093.51點，站回5、10日雙線，觸及月線、33700關卡，尾盤量縮較難撐33500關卡。

周三終場，加權指數上漲826.87點或2.54%，報33439.11點，成交量降至6247.11億元；櫃檯指數上漲12.13點或3.88%，報324.87點，成交量同降至1606.35億元。

個股貢獻度來看，台積電(2330)上漲35元至1845元，貢獻286.53點最威；台達電(2308)同樣貢獻百點為118.96點，智邦(2345)、日月光投控(3711)也雙雙拉提指數28點，欣興(3037)、鴻海(2317)、致茂(2360)、奇鋐(3017)亦貢獻指數20點以上。拉低指數前五大為億豐(8464)、華邦電(2344)、台塑化(6505)、神基(3005)、創意(3443)，其中南亞科跌深強漲收紅，華邦電則震盪收黑。

成交量前十大個股，力積電(6770)上漲居冠，面板廠賣廠群創(3481)強漲居次，華邦電帶量排第三，隨後依序為燿華(2367)、台玻(1802)、瑞軒(2489)、南亞科(2408)、富喬(1815)、元晶(6443)、宏齊(6168)，其中光電、記憶體、玻陶均入列。

台新投顧副總經理黃文清表示，台股正往正向方向發展，新訊息釋出美國與伊朗和談，雖然雙方仍有不小歧見，但已顯見邁出關鍵第一步，美國川普面臨期中選舉壓力恐怕不願意繼續打，伊朗後續也沒有能力繼續打，協議達成需要時間，但雙方和談對金融市場為利多，預估大盤震盪走穩，中小型股仍活蹦跳，權值股則留意外資回流速度，對後續走勢可期。

戰火停歇後，市場回歸基本面、總經狀況，其中油價牽動通膨，市場擔憂美國聯準會(FED)能否再啟動降息，近期美國聯準會主席議題漸受關注，由於司法部向鮑爾發動刑事調查，導致參議院表明在調查案結束前不會對華許行使同意權，使華許能否在5月鮑爾任滿時順利接班出現疑慮，且鮑爾表態願意留任主席至下任主席順利產生，加上美伊戰爭引發通膨升溫，皆導致川普加快降息主張面臨考驗，市場先前更傳出升息聲音，市場目前主流聲量分兩派，預測2026年底前將不再降息、下半年有機會再降兩碼。

黃副總認為，若下半年降息有機會，有助外資回流，評估短期外資賣超力道趨緩，評估四月有機會再創歷史新高點。操作上，AI為主流無虞，COWOS、光通訊、低軌衛星、利基型記憶體等題材亦可期，推升股市重回熱絡情況。

即將進入第二季，本土法人也認為，四月指數預估在月線上下整理待變，油價強弱成為關鍵，長線緊盯降息，降息機率升高才能解決困境，第二季股市區間震盪。不過科技巨頭仍齊喊旺AI前景，操作上，宜AI伺服器概念中小股、廠務設備股、光通訊股、營建股、低基期漲價概念股、存股概念股。
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股25日開漲113.03點，終場上漲826.87點或2.54%，報33439.11點，成交量降至6247.11億元。
• 台積電(2330)上漲35元至1845元，貢獻286.53點最為顯著。
• 台達電(2308)貢獻118.96點，智邦(2345)、日月光投控(3711)亦貢獻28點以上。
• 市場預期四月有機會再創歷史新高點，操作上AI為主流，COWOS、光通訊、低軌衛星等題材亦可期。
• 預期下半年若有降息機會，將有助外資回流。
news.Keywords: 台股反彈,權值股,AI,光通訊,外資回流

news.Title: 收盤／台積電帶隊狂飆！台股暴衝826點　載板、CPO亮燈回神
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

在美國總統川普宣布暫停對伊朗能源設施軍事行動五天後，中東地緣政治風險短線降溫，帶動全球股市情緒回暖，台股今日呈現開高走穩格局，盤中維持高檔震盪，台股今（25）日強勢反攻，加權指數終場大漲826.87點，收在33439.11點，漲幅2.53%，成交金額達6247.11億元；櫃買指數同步大漲3.88%，成交金額1606.35億元，市場買氣明顯回溫。

半導體成交比重撐盤 AI族群成盤面主角

從盤面結構來看，今日成交金額高度集中在電子與半導體族群，成為推升大盤的主要動能。以成交排行觀察，台積電、台達電、智邦、奇鋐、台光電等權值與AI概念股全面走強，顯示資金明顯回流電子主流。

其中半導體與AI伺服器供應鏈扮演關鍵角色。台達電大漲9.54%、智邦飆升9.77%、華通與奇鋐漲幅也接近或超過8%，顯示市場資金鎖定高成長題材。南亞科上漲4.61%、力積電漲3.66%，記憶體族群同步回溫。相較之下，盤面僅少數個股表現疲弱，如華邦電小跌1.30%，顯示整體市場呈現「強者恆強」格局，資金集中度相當高。

台積電上漲35元成關鍵 權值股全面點火

權王台積電今日上漲35元，收在1845元，漲幅1.93%，不僅穩定軍心，更直接推升大盤指數表現。除了台積電外，高價電子股同步發力。台光電大漲160元、漲幅5.95%，奇鋐上漲155元，台燿上漲7.2%，顯示高價股與AI相關族群形成多頭主軸。IC設計龍頭聯發科則維持平盤，對指數影響相對中性。另外，網通與AI設備股表現亮眼，智邦與華通雙雙漲停，成為盤面資金追逐焦點，也反映市場對AI基礎建設需求持續看好。

倫元投顧陳學進分析師認為，在護國神山台積電、CPO光通訊聯亞、環宇-KY、IET-KY、華星光、眾達-KY、穩懋、全新、訊芯-KY、ABF載板欣興、南電、景碩、CoWoS暨自動化設備弘塑、萬潤、辛耘、大量、致茂、均華、PCB定穎投、邑昇、AI電源台達電、網路交換器智邦、連接器嘉澤、嘉基、以及低軌衛星概念股昇達科、華通、燿華等許多重量級指標股強勢大漲、甚至亮燈漲停的帶動下，使得台股得以一吐悶氣「開高震盪走高」大漲上來，盤中指數一度大漲近1100點，甚至OTC櫃買指數的表現更猛，盤中大漲逾4%、並站上於10日線及月線之上，今日的大漲，不僅有效化解再探底的危機，並且隨著市場買盤可望陸續回籠的加持下，預期第二季台股指數續戰新高可期，一旦美伊雙方取得一定的共識，本周將有機會見關鍵轉折低點。

市場情緒轉多 短線反彈仍須留意變數

整體來看，今日台股大漲主要反映國際政治風險降溫與資金回流電子族群的雙重利多。不過，市場仍須關注中東局勢是否再度升溫，以及美股後續表現與資金動向。

啟發投顧容逸燊分析師認為，指數大漲900點未再開高走低，油價已暗示中東地緣風險逐漸消退，3萬2成為中期重要支撐，但今日量能稍嫌不足，目前3萬4以上月線壓力還需帶量越過才可創歷史新高。CPO族群因美股龍頭大漲帶動多檔漲停，下半年將是光通訊將開始貢獻營收，C

• 受中東地緣政治風險短線降溫影響，台股25日強勢反攻，加權指數終場大漲826.87點，收在33439.11點，漲幅2.53%。
• 成交金額達6247.11億元，櫃買指數同步大漲3.88%，市場買氣明顯回溫。
• 成交金額高度集中在電子與半導體族群，台積電、台達電、智邦、奇鋐、台光電等權值與AI概念股全面走強。
• 台積電上漲35元，收在1845元，漲幅1.93%，穩定軍心並推升大盤指數。
• 分析師認為，在多檔指標股強勢大漲帶動下，台股得以化解再探底危機，預期第二季指數續戰新高可期。
news.Keywords: 中東局勢,台股反彈,電子股,半導體,AI概念股

news.Title: SpaceX要上市了！「最快本週IPO」激勵台股低軌衛星族群　穩懋鎖漲停、華通也亮燈
news.Content:
美國科技媒體《The Information》3/24引述消息人士指出，航太通訊龍頭SpaceX最快將於本週稍晚向監管機構提交IPO招股說明書，目標於2026年6月掛牌。消息一出，台股低軌衛星族群3/2強勢噴發，盤中多達7檔個股亮燈漲停，族群買氣爆棚。

知情人士透露，SpaceX此次秘密提交說明書，將正式敲定IPO計畫，並計畫於6月掛牌上市，並表示參與這宗有望成為美國史上規模最大IPO案籌備的顧問估計，SpaceX在此次IPO可能打算募資超過750億美元，遠高於此前報導的500億美元估值。報導也指出，散戶投資人配售比例可能超過20%，但最終細節仍未拍板，不過SpaceX尚未針對相關消息做出回應。

基本面方面，SpaceX旗下Starlink（星鏈）服務持續擴張，公司目標今年底用戶數成長1.5倍，意味著衛星發射需求將同步放大。供應鏈透露，隨著新一代衛星導入多頻譜設計，單顆衛星使用元件數與產值皆明顯提升，加上大型火箭運載能力提升，發射數量亦將增加。

消息傳出後，台股低軌衛星概念股瞬間成為矚目焦點，穩懋（3105）直接跳空漲停鎖死，正文（4906）、昇達科（3491）及華通（2313）盤中也頻頻亮燈，其中正文、昇達科終場順利鎖住漲停。此外，燿華（2367）、啟碁（6285）、台燿（6274）、兆赫（2485）同樣走強，終場漲幅皆超過 5%，元晶（6443）、群創（3481）也收紅，資金顯著集中於航太通訊相關族群。

台廠供應鏈也同步受惠，昇達科指出，主要客戶已啟動下一代衛星開發，帶動訂單動能增溫；華通則表示，衛星用板需求強勁，天上衛星產品占比持續提升，產能利用率維持高檔，有助毛利率表現，法人亦看好在全球低軌衛星供應鏈具高度技術門檻下，相關廠商具備長期競爭優勢。

不過SpaceX IPO題材與Starlink用戶高速成長帶動相關產業升溫之際，仍須留意外部變數，隨著中東地緣政治局勢持續緊繃、談判進展反覆，加上油市供應趨緊、價格波動擴大，短線仍可能干擾資金風險偏好。
news.AI_Summary:
• 受SpaceX最快本週提交IPO招股說明書消息激勵，台股低軌衛星族群3月25日強勢噴發，穩懋、正文、昇達科、華通等個股亮燈漲停。
• SpaceX IPO計畫目標募資超過750億美元，有望成為美國史上規模最大IPO案。
• SpaceX旗下Starlink服務持續擴張，目標今年底用戶數成長1.5倍，帶動衛星發射需求放大。
• 台廠供應鏈如昇達科、華通表示，主要客戶已啟動下一代衛星開發，帶動訂單動能增溫。
• 需留意中東地緣政治局勢緊繃、油價波動等外部變數對資金風險偏好的干擾。
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO,低軌衛星,航太通訊,衛星發射,地緣政治風險

news.Title: 台積電上漲35元　台股揚升826點收33439點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年3月25日電）台股今天開高走高，盤中最高達到33705.75點，突破月線33693點關卡，終場漲幅收斂，收在33439.11點，上漲826.87點，未能站穩月線，仍收復5日均線33201點，成交值新台幣6247.11億元。

台積電 (2330) 今天收在1845元，上漲35元，市值增加新台幣9076億元，達到47.84兆元，貢獻大盤約278點。

台達電 (2308) 勁揚135元，收在1550元，其餘權值股鴻海 (2317) 、日月光投控 (3711) 以及高價股信驊 (5274) 走高，帶動整體電子類股指數上揚2.81%。金融股類股指數上揚1.51%，塑膠、機電、電纜和玻璃等傳統產業股類股指數上揚逾2%。

news.Title: 台積電上漲35元　台股揚升826點收33439點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年3月25日電）台股今天開高走高，盤中最高達到33705.75點，突破月線33693點關卡，終場漲幅收斂，收在33439.11點，上漲826.87點，未能站穩月線，仍收復5日均線33201點，成交值新台幣6247.11億元。

台積電 (2330) 今天收在1845元，上漲35元，市值增加新台幣9076億元，達到47.84兆元，貢獻大盤約278點。

台達電 (2308) 勁揚135元，收在1550元，其餘權值股鴻海 (2317) 、日月光投控 (3711) 以及高價股信驊 (5274) 走高，帶動整體電子類股指數上揚2.81%。金融股類股指數上揚1.51%，塑膠、機電、電纜和玻璃等傳統產業股類股指數上揚逾2%。

news.Title: 【台北股市】漲826.87點
news.Content:
（中央社台北2026年3月25日電）台北股市今天開高走高，收盤漲826.87點，為33439.11點，漲幅2.54%，成交金額新台幣6247.11億元。

加權指數開盤為32725.27點，盤中最高33705.75點，最低32725.27點；不含金融股指數29896.72點，漲765.91點。

八大類股漲跌幅：泥窯股漲1.94%、食品股漲0.77%、塑化股漲1.50%、紡織股跌0.21%、機電股漲2.83%、造紙股漲0.94%、營建股漲1.80%、金融股漲1.51%。

委買張數2135萬9785張，委賣張數1170萬8710張，成交張數862萬2722張。

收盤時上漲860家，下跌169家，持平65家。

成交量前5名個股為力積電、群創、華邦電、主動統一台股增長、凱基台灣TOP50。

漲幅前5名個股為宏碁遊戲-創、期元大S&P黃金正2、期元大道瓊白銀、訊芯-KY、欣興。

跌幅前5名個股為精金、華夏、台達化、台苯、期街口布蘭特正2。

news.Title: 台股滿血復活！權值股帶頭衝   終場狂飆915點   重返3萬3大關
news.Content:
美國總統川普聲稱談判取得進展，卻又傳出派遣地面部隊前往中東，市場憂心美伊戰事陷入膠著，油價再度上揚。美股四大指數收黑，台股昨日反攻失利，今日（3/25）滿血復活，早上以3萬2725.27點開出，隨即強彈逾900點，刷史上第七大盤中漲點，終場則是收3萬3527.29點，大漲915.05點，成交值縮小至6247.11億元。

儘管川普對外表示，美國目前正在與伊朗進行談判，並補充「對方也想達成協議」，但根據紐約時報報導，國防部官員透露，美軍高層正評估調派陸軍第八十二空降師的一個作戰旅及部分師部人員，支援伊朗軍事行動。引發投資人擔憂戰爭恐曠日持久，導致油價居高不下，更進一步推升通膨。

道瓊工業指數下跌84.41點、0.18%，收在46124.06點；那斯達克指數下跌下跌184.87點、0.84%，收在21761.89點；標準普爾500指數下跌24.63點、0.37%，收在6556.37點；費城半導體指數上漲99.58點、1.28%，收在7872.71點。

同時，國際油價在前一交易日暴跌後恢復反彈，倫敦北海布倫特原油5月交割價上漲4.55美元或4.55%，收在每桶104.49美元；紐約商品交易所西德州中級原油5月結算價上漲4.22美元或4.79%，收每桶92.35美元。

值得注意的是台積電ADR上漲1.42%，收在343.25美元。權王台積電昨日收在1810元，今開盤漲55元，午盤收在1845元、漲幅1.93%。鴻海收盤則是站穩200元、漲幅2.56%；股王信驊以1萬1640點開出，最高來到1萬1950元，收盤為1萬1500元、略顯收斂，漲幅仍有5.41%。

13：42更新尾盤數據
news.AI_Summary:
• 受川普聲稱談判取得進展影響，台股25日一早以32725.27點開出，隨即大漲逾900點，順利站上3萬3000點，目前來到33594.36點。
• 台積電ADR上漲1.42%，昨日收在1810元，今開盤漲55元至1865元。
• 鴻海一開盤也站回200元、漲幅2.56%，股王信驊也以1萬1640點開出，大漲5.45%。
• 儘管川普聲稱談判，但美軍評估調派地面部隊，引發市場擔憂戰爭曠日持久，油價居高不下，推升通膨。
• 美股四大指數收黑，僅費城半導體指數上漲1.28%。
news.Keywords: 台股反彈,川普,美伊談判,油價,通膨

news.Title: 台股收盤暴漲826點「強勢重返3萬3」！ 台積電彈35元收1845
news.Content:
台股今（25）天在權值股強勢帶動下，強勢反攻，一度漲破千點達33705.75點，終場上漲826.87點，收在33439.11點，漲幅2.54%，收復3萬3千點關卡與5日線，市場信心湧入，成交量6247億。

盤面上仍是電子股領軍， 台積電 開盤就強彈3%，最終上漲35元到1845元，台達電大漲135元至1550元，差一檔就亮燈，鴻海漲5元回到200元，聯發科則是衝高後收平盤價1620元。

半導體電子零組件類股群升，玻璃陶瓷指同步帶高漲4.1%，在資金流動下，橡膠、油電燃氣走跌。

另外，外媒報導SpaceX計劃最快在本週遞出IPO申請，讓低軌衛星概念股噴發漲停，昇達科亮燈1410元到收盤，華通、燿華達同步收在230元與75.1元漲停價。

責任編輯／洪季謙

• 台股25日受權值股帶動，強勢反攻，一度漲破千點達33705.75點，終場上漲826.87點，收在33439.11點，收復3萬3千點關卡與5日線。
• 成交量6247億元，電子股領軍，台積電上漲35元到1845元，台達電大漲135元至1550元，鴻海漲5元回到200元。
• 聯發科衝高後收平盤價1620元。
• 半導體電子零組件類股群升，玻璃陶瓷指同步帶高漲4.1%，橡膠、油電燃氣走跌。
• 外媒報導SpaceX計劃IPO，低軌衛星概念股噴發漲停，昇達科、華通、燿華達同步收在漲停價。

news.Title: 台股重返33K 收盤大漲826點 台積電強彈35元收1845
news.Content:
台股今（25日）反彈上漲，早盤即上漲超過900點，一路維持至尾盤，終場收在33,439.11點，大漲826.87點，權值股台積電漲35元，收在1845元，聯發科收平盤1620元，鴻海同步走高，上漲5元，收在200元。股王信驊大漲5.41%，收在11,500元，最高觸及11,950元，距離歷史新高12,450元仍有段差距。

針對台股後市，工商報導，萬寶投顧董事長朱成志認為，美總統川普TACO成為市場認知慣性，但戰事並非如同關稅單方面決定，伊朗態度是關鍵，導致台股開盤振奮後熄火下跌，在亞股中表現相對弱勢，究其原因應為內資、主力信心不足所致，對戰事後續發展預料趨近尾聲，最恐慌時刻已過。

近期市場仍充滿不穩定，即使美國總統川普不斷釋出要與伊朗談判的訊號，被市場視為休戰指標，但伊朗態度未明，雙方尚未出現會面或具體和談的承諾，使投資者仍對後市缺乏信心。

周二美股四大指數僅費城半導體指數收紅，漲幅達1.28%，台積電ADR上漲4.80美元（或1.42%）至343.25美元，輝達下跌0.48美元（或0.27%）至175.20美元，超微AMD上漲2.69美元（或1.33%）至205.37美元。

科技巨頭方面，Google母公司Alphabet跌幅最重下殺3.28%，Meta出現1.90%的跌勢，亞馬遜也走低跌1.43%，蘋果與特斯拉小漲，漲幅皆在1%左右。
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股25日反彈上漲，早盤上漲超過900點，終場收在33,439.11點，大漲826.87點。
• 權值股台積電漲35元，收在1845元，聯發科收平盤1620元，鴻海同步走高，上漲5元，收在200元。
• 股王信驊大漲5.41%，收在11,500元，最高觸及11,950元。
• 萬寶投顧董事長朱成志認為，對戰事後續發展預料趨近尾聲，最恐慌時刻已過。
• 美股四大指數僅費城半導體指數收紅，台積電ADR上漲1.42%。
news.Keywords: 台股反彈,權值股,AI概念股,美伊談判,半導體

周二美股四大指數僅費城半導體指數收紅，漲幅達1.28%，台積電ADR上漲4.80美元（或1.42%）至343.25美元，輝達下跌0.48美元（或0.27%）至175.20美元，超微AMD上漲2.69美元（或1.33%）至205.37美元。

科技巨頭方面，Google母公司Alphabet跌幅最重下殺3.28%，Meta出現1.90%的跌勢，亞馬遜也走低跌1.43%，蘋果與特斯拉小漲，漲幅皆在1%左右。

• 權值股台積電漲35元，收在1845元，聯發科收平盤1620元，鴻海同步走高，上漲5元，收在200元。
• 股王信驊大漲5.41%，收在11,500元，最高觸及11,950元。

news.Title: Adobe (ADBE)-NVIDIA Alliance Targets Next Wave of AI Content Creation
news.Content:
Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE ) is one of the best cheapest stocks to buy on Robinhood . On March 16, Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) and NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) announced a strategic partnership to accelerate artificial-intelligence-powered content creation, marketing automation, and personalization. The partnership was inaugurated at NVIDIA’s GPU Technology Conference (GTC) 2026 in San Jose, California.

Pixabay/Public Domain

The focal point of the deal is the next generation of Adobe Firefly models, which will be built on NVIDIA’s advanced computing infrastructure. According to Adobe, the new models will tap into NVIDIA CUDA-X libraries, NeMo libraries, Cosmos open models, and the Agent Toolkit. The goal is to give brands sharper creative precision and greater control across marketing pipelines, said Adobe.

The partnership also pushes Adobe deeper into agentic AI. For starters, Adobe will draw on NVIDIA’s Agent Toolkit and Nemotron open models to power these agentic workflows. The company hopes that this will enable faster content and campaign production.

On the 3D front, Adobe will build a cloud-native 3D digital twin solution using NVIDIA Omniverse libraries, RTX rendering, and the company’s own generative AI platforms. Adobe stated that the solution will help brands automate marketing content.

The partnership extends across Adobe’s entire product stack. That is, Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Frame.io, Acrobat, GenStudio, and Adobe Experience Platform will all benefit from NVIDIA’s AI infrastructure. Notably, Adobe Acrobat will integrate NVIDIA’s Nemotron capabilities to improve document intelligence. On the other hand, Frame.io will use NVIDIA CUDA to speed up media processing and enable smarter, AI-driven content search.

Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) develops software products for creative design, digital media, marketing, and document management. Its portfolio includes Photoshop, Illustrator, Acrobat, and the Creative Cloud suite, which are widely used by individuals and enterprises for content creation and productivity.

While we acknowledge the potential of ADBE as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock .

Disclosure: None. Follow Insider Monkey on Google News .

Adobe (ADBE)-NVIDIA Alliance Targets Next Wave of AI Content Creation

Adobe (ADBE)-NVIDIA Alliance Targets Next Wave of AI Content Creation Pixabay/Public Domain
news.AI_Summary:
• Adobe and NVIDIA announced a strategic partnership to accelerate AI-powered content creation, marketing automation, and personalization.
• The collaboration will leverage NVIDIA's advanced computing infrastructure, including CUDA-X libraries and NeMo libraries, for Adobe's Firefly models.
• The partnership aims to enhance creative precision, control across marketing pipelines, and push Adobe deeper into agentic AI.
• Adobe will utilize NVIDIA Omniverse libraries for 3D digital twin solutions and integrate NVIDIA's Nemotron capabilities into Adobe Acrobat for improved document intelligence.
news.Keywords: strategic partnership, AI content creation, generative AI, NVIDIA infrastructure, Adobe Firefly

news.Title: 中東局勢緩和激勵台股 早盤強勢反彈逾千點
news.Content:
受到美國和伊朗有機會和談，美國費半指數收紅，激勵亞股週三強彈走高，日股大漲超過1500點，韓股漲幅超過3%，台股走勢居高不下，早盤狂升超過千點，最高一度3萬3705點。

萬寶投顧執行長王榮旭表示，「Fed這個降息的預期變成升息，這個科技股受到這樣的影響是最大，所以當油價重挫的時候，這個科技股的反彈力道就最強。」

專家分析，台股能跳空激情反彈，主要是因為電子股領漲，不只台積電早盤站上1875元、漲65元，台達電上漲氣勢無法擋，急拉狂奔到1555元的漲停價位，寫下新高紀錄。鴻海也一度重回200元，聯發科一度漲超過1%。

不過因中東戰事緩解，國際油價回落，油氣類股跟著走跌。對於近期台股受到美伊戰事影響，外界關注國安基金何時進場？

財政部長莊翠雲說明，「如果有符合《國安基金管理條例》第8條的條件的話，我們也可以隨時召開臨時會議，來決定是否要來做相關的一個維護資本市場穩定。」

財政部長莊翠雲表示會密切關注中東戰事變化，至於當沖降稅在2027年底到期，會在明（2027）年下半年和金管會討論是否延長實施。

週三台灣金融市場股匯齊揚，新台幣兌美元以31.98元開出，早盤最高一度觸及31.897元、升1.31角。台經院認為，如果中東戰事還沒結束，恐怕仍會繼續影響美元和新台幣走勢。

台經院景氣預測中心主任孫明德認為，「最近的匯率上漲，一方面是避險，另外一方面是美國跟原物料的連動性，那其他的貨幣大多都是往下掉的，如果中東戰爭不結束，我想這個美元強勢的情況還會維持下去。」

台經院院長張建一表示，因國際油價上漲引發通膨疑慮，萬一出現通膨，恐怕引發股市下跌，影響全球經濟成長率，短期內各國恐仍面臨物價上漲的通膨壓力。
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美伊和談預期及美費半指數收紅激勵，亞股週三強彈，日股大漲逾1500點，韓股漲幅超過3%，台股早盤狂升超過千點，最高一度33705點。
• 萬寶投顧執行長王榮旭表示，Fed降息預期轉為升息，科技股受影響最大，油價重挫時科技股反彈力道最強。
• 台積電早盤站上1875元、漲65元，台達電急拉狂奔到1555元漲停價位，創下新高紀錄。
• 鴻海一度重回200元，聯發科一度漲超過1%。
• 因中東戰事緩解，國際油價回落，油氣類股跟著走跌。
news.Keywords: 美伊和談,亞股反彈,科技股,台積電,台達電

news.Title: Could Supermicro's Latest Crisis Create a Buying Opportunity in 2026? Here's What the Evidence Says
news.Content:
Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) has surged more than 460% over the past five years. However, it hasn't come without stomach-churning volatility along the way. That's at least partly due to the company's tendency to find itself embroiled in controversy.

Most recently, the U.S. Justice Department indicted three company employees, including one of the company's co-founders, on charges of conspiring to smuggle $2.5 billion in Nvidia GPU artificial intelligence (AI) chips to China, in violation of the Export Control Reform Act.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Sometimes, a short-term crisis can become a buying opportunity for long-term investors. Is this one of those moments? Here is what the evidence could be trying to tell you.

Where there's smoke, could there be fire?

According to a Fortune report, the Justice Department alleges that the three individuals operated a scheme in which they sold banned hardware to an unnamed company in Southeast Asia, which then rerouted the hardware to the true buyers in China.

It's important to note that the Justice Department hasn't brought any charges or allegations against Super Micro Computer itself, only the three employees. Investors should also know that Super Micro Computer is cooperating with investigators. The co-founder, Yih-Shyan Liaw, has resigned from the company's board and remains employed, though he is currently on administrative leave.

There may not be a stock with this valuation and such high growth

Despite the controversy, Super Micro Computer is churning out breathtaking growth as a top AI stock . The company's trailing-12-month sales of $28 billion are up by more than 326% over the past three years.

Super Micro Computer designs and builds high-performance server systems for data centers, which have been in high demand over the past several years as AI companies can't build up data center capacity fast enough. As AI investments continue, Wall Street analysts estimate that Super Micro Computer's revenue will explode to $41.5 billion this fiscal year, and $49.1 billion next year.

Given that Super Micro Computer stock sits 80% off its all-time high in early 2024, the company trades at just 0.5 times its trailing-12-month sales, its lowest valuation in recent history. You may not find a cheaper stock with that kind of growth.

Story Continues

It all comes down to this

Of course, the question becomes: Why is Super Micro Computer stock so cheap? It almost seems too good to be true. Well, it turns out there might be reasons for that.

For starters, Super Micro Computer pleaded guilty in federal court back in 2006 to operating a similar export scheme to send hardware to Iran.

There have also been multiple controversies over the years related to the company's financial practices. Ernst & Young resigned as Super Micro Computer's auditor in late 2024 due to integrity concerns. Around the same time, the Justice Department opened a probe into allegations of accounting violations by a former employee.

Super Micro Computer conducted an internal review that found no misconduct, but that's sort of like grading your own homework. Again, there are no smoking guns here. Still, it's quite a bit of smoke for investors to dismiss all of this circumstantial evidence. Sometimes, where there is smoke, there is, in fact, fire.

It's a slippery slope when a company tangles with controversy related to integrity and doing things the right way. How can an investor or shareholder expect a company to operate in their best interests if they're consistently pushing the boundaries of the rules at best, or, at worst, doing something immoral that they simply haven't been caught or punished for yet?

Yes, the stock could take off if the Justice Department clears Super Micro Computer and this all blows over. The company's growth is stellar; I won't deny that. But investing is ultimately a partnership between a business and its shareholders, and what's a partnership without trust?
news.AI_Summary:
• Super Micro Computer is facing controversy as three employees were indicted for allegedly smuggling $2.5 billion in Nvidia AI chips to China.
• The company itself has not been charged, and it is cooperating with investigators; a co-founder has resigned from the board.
• Despite the issues, Super Micro Computer shows strong growth, with trailing-12-month sales of $28 billion (up 326% in three years) and projected revenue of $41.5B this fiscal year.
• The stock trades at 0.5x trailing sales, its lowest valuation, but past controversies regarding financial practices and auditor resignations raise concerns.
news.Keywords: smuggling charges, AI chips, revenue growth, valuation, integrity concerns

news.Title: SK Hynix to Float US Shares This Year to Feed AI Memory Boom
news.Content:
(Bloomberg) -- SK Hynix Inc. seeks to list its American Depositary Receipts in what may be one of the biggest US debuts by a foreign company ever, part of the chipmaker’s bid to keep pace with artificial intelligence’s voracious demand for memory.

The advanced memory supplier to Nvidia Corp. aims to make an offering in New York in the second half of the year, Chief Executive Officer Kwak Noh-Jung told shareholders during an annual general meeting on Wednesday. When asked if SK Hynix seeks to raise as much as 15 trillion won ($10 billion) as reported by local media, Kwak said no decision has been made, but that the company aims to boost its value in line with other AI hardware suppliers.

The move “opens the door to global investors and boosts liquidity at a key moment in the AI-driven memory cycle,”said Dilin Wu, a research strategist at Pepperstone Group who also warned that investors need to balance the upside in global visibility against short-term dilution risk. “Issuing new shares inevitably dilutes existing equity, and any perception that the company is raising cash at a cycle peak could weigh on sentiment.”

Shares of SK Hynix gained as much as 5.7% after the company said it made a confidential submission to the US Securities and Exchange Commission to list. SK Hynix’s Japanese chip gear suppliers Tokyo Electron Ltd., Advantest Corp. and Screen Holdings Co. also rose in Tokyo. Since the start of the year, SK Hynix’s stock price has risen more than 50% on top of a roughly 275% surge in 2025. Shares were up around 1% during afternoon trade.

Companies including Meta Platforms Inc. and Alphabet Inc. are gobbling up ever-rising amounts of memory via orders for millions of AI accelerators that come with big packs of DRAM. The lucrative returns on high-bandwidth memory are spurring a race between SK Hynix, Samsung Electronics Co. and Micron Technology Inc. while creating sharp shortages in conventional memory products.

A South Korean investor group cautioned about the dilution risk if the company were to issue new shares for the US float. It urged the chipmaker to buy back 10% to 15% of its shares and listing part of those in the US instead.

“An ADR listing does not automatically lead to an equity valuation re-rating,” the nonprofit Korean Corporate Governance Forum said, calling such an assumption “highly naive.” “A re-rating can only occur if governance improvements come first,” it said.

The offering is part of the company’s efforts to elevate the chipmaker’s global market valuation, Kwak said. SK Hynix will seek to keep its lead in AI semiconductors such as HBM by strategically investing the more than 100 trillion won the company plans to set aside, he said.

Story Continues

Kwak also told shareholders that SK Hynix is negotiating a shift toward longer-term contracts to stabilize supply and alleviate shortage concerns, on a case-by-case basis.

SK Hynix is ramping up investment to meet AI’s escalating needs for rapid access to data, with plans to build a sprawling semiconductor cluster in Yongin, South Korea. Earlier this week, it said it plans to spend $8 billion on cutting-edge extreme ultraviolet lithography chipmaking tools from ASML Holding NV, equipment necessary to scale up quickly. That’s as Samsung plans to spend some $73 billion on chip capacity expansion and research this year.

SK Hynix has so far dominated the HBM arena, but Samsung — which also makes smartphones and displays — has mobilized its heft to narrow the gap. Samsung’s market value stands at around $760 billion to SK Hynix’s $480 billion.

Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s US listing in 1997 helped the company reach American investors. It’s also channeled passive inflows from ETFs tracking US-listed shares, bolstering its valuation.

--With assistance from Sangmi Cha, Shinhye Kang, Seyoon Kim and Denny Thomas.

(Updates with executive and analyst comments.)
